Friend, 100 votes almost ended my service before it began. My name is Mike Rogers, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. I got my start in public service by enlisting in the Army. I later went on to serve as an FBI Special Agent, taking on some of the worst mob bosses, predators, and organized criminals in the country. My desire to serve my country and my community eventually led me to run for Congress. With a Democrat vacating my home district, I knew that this was my chance to make a difference for Michiganders in Washington D.C. It was a tough, hard-fought race against the Democrat Machine, but my passion for public service and desire to serve my community got me through the long days on the trail. **[And when all was said and done, I won my first run for federal office by just 111 votes.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=5d27932398a04bbd93eeb310b0fa7921&_e=nduOQBL91DRJfdYpuVyDVOtLWgQA7AyeACTYgu3E_Hd6a1Red2D8fu4IvjibF_SFRz_6IepA9JRyFvZJslOWy3E-OYdfIRe_3TYo8M8DTR9aahupnBpO3rB3K31_kQLpkAddDO3QNs4ZOSWe-t8TdjKgkvFerm1H-ovb35OHCaFAP4v-4r4LYNWBW03-HlJlE-0A-aMfzNC6EGpymFH2FP4yWnftCtIB5mL7aSFUe1zYTOuY15E4QB1UbG8Fhm4DLG5Gw4hpy_9BKqkuh7DwUmQAX5m4h-N0_bAe34_w36-89boO1ABEg3nHDGb7newGwPdXNZkGthauFGfzXtqd2uc6rlZ0qRIzDWJSp-0QTzrKzNUmIbmcrgvTdnCdKFAqiVihVfdnAALijjc7VYAcguqyw-mOU_sS9pETbhTjRnk%3D)** A lot has changed since then. I left Congress in 2015 after serving as Chair of the Intelligence Committee. I thought that would be the end of my days in Washington, but with our country and our values under attack like never before, I couldn’t bear to sit on the sidelines. -A President who’s as corrupt as he is incompetent, making our country a more dangerous place -A southern border that’s so poorly managed, it might as well not even be a line on a map -An economy that’s leaving Americans behind while enriching our enemies -A justice system plagued by thousands of scandals and ethics violations **These are just a few of the issues that have spurred me to run for Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat.** And it just so happens that my home state is primed to be one of next year’s most competitive states. For the last four cycles, the party that wins Michigan has won not only the Senate, but also the White House. That means the whole country will be watching what we do next year. As I mentioned before, I’m no stranger to winning close races, and I’ve already been hard at work pounding the pavement from Detroit to Dowagiac all the way to the Upper Peninsula with my message. **But campaigns on this scale aren’t cheap.** That’s why I need your help, Friend. **[Any amount that you can give will go a long way toward helping me win this crucial swing seat.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=5d27932398a04bbd93eeb310b0fa7921&_e=nduOQBL91DRJfdYpuVyDVOtLWgQA7AyeACTYgu3E_Hd6a1Red2D8fu4IvjibF_SFRz_6IepA9JRyFvZJslOWy3E-OYdfIRe_3TYo8M8DTR9aahupnBpO3rB3K31_kQLpkAddDO3QNs4ZOSWe-t8TdjKgkvFerm1H-ovb35OHCaFAP4v-4r4LYNWBW03-HlJlE-0A-aMfzNC6EGpymFH2FP4yWnftCtIB5mL7aSFUe1zYTOuY15E4QB1UbG8Fhm4DX7hqJ2mfo4DCG1AwOI_fF_Jbl1nGbdK7NNVLehmgqICOHeIou_XjBGEh9CZH2I1YZWl3cQqaWmQR4MfjnQPZKvQMVLcxxf1RkY8yW-1lr2qNtpmSf6U4XVII2Fo6zMkz2oupZ_qaPoPbPKASXwO1d1StfM-TnH8Vl9aEaGSiV4A%3D)** Your donation of $5, $10, or $20 could pay for the phone call, the door knock, or the campaign event that seals the deal not only for us here in Michigan, but for the whole country. So, Friend, can I count on your help? Sincerely,

| | | | Happy New Year, Peter! 2023 was a wild and wonderful year for the Dahlstrom family and the launch of this campaign. Together, our team is building a strong campaign and meeting Alaskans from all walks of life. We've come a long way, but we've only just begun this journey to give Alaska the voice it needs in Congress. From our family to yours, Happy New Year! Warmly, The Dahlstrom Family

| | Patriot,

---
I’ve prepared a report for my TOP grassroots supporters like you to see where we stand on THE FIRST DAY of the 2024 election year.
---
One year ago today, Crooked Joe Biden and his Democrat accomplices believed that 2023 would mark the __END__ of the Make America Great Again movement.
---
They concocted a nefarious plot to weaponize our nation’s legal system to have me indicted and arrested in an attempt to eliminate their leading opponent before the 2024 year even began.
---
It’s something you’d expect to read out of a textbook on the Soviet Union.
---
_But one year later, their plans didn’t go as they had hoped._
---
I am honored to tell you that we are beginning the 2024 Election Year in our strongest possible position since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator and announced my bid to run for president as a political outsider.
---
Despite having access to every single lever of power you could imagine, Biden is __still__ LOSING.

---
And I’ll tell you why. Because there’s nothing more powerful than YOU, the American people.
---
Tyrants are no match for the peaceful patriots of our country.
---
Crooked Joe can go on a tyrannical rampage all he wants, but he will _NEVER_ have the backing of the patriots of our country.
---
There’s only one thing that scares a tyrant – and that’s a free and united PEOPLE.
---
_2023 may have been a dark chapter in American history. But it also proved that there is no greater force on the face of the planet than when patriots of a nation unite to make their country great again._
---
Now, let’s begin 2024 by showing the Democrat Dictators just how strong our movement truly is by making the FIRST DAY OF THE YEAR our strongest yet.
---

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | | | Patriot, I’ve prepared a report for my TOP grassroots supporters like you to see where we stand on THE FIRST DAY of the 2024 election year. One year ago today, Crooked Joe Biden and his Democrat accomplices believed that 2023 would mark the END of the Make America Great Again movement. They concocted a nefarious plot to weaponize our nation’s legal system to have me indicted and arrested in an attempt to eliminate their leading opponent before the 2024 year even began. It’s something you’d expect to read out of a textbook on the Soviet Union. But one year later, their plans didn’t go as they had hoped. I am honored to tell you that we are beginning the 2024 Election Year in our strongest possible position since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator and announced my bid to run for president as a political outsider. Despite having access to every single lever of power you could imagine, Biden is still LOSING. And I’ll tell you why. Because there’s nothing more powerful than YOU, the American people. Tyrants are no match for the peaceful patriots of our country. Crooked Joe can go on a tyrannical rampage all he wants, but he will NEVER have the backing of the patriots of our country. There’s only one thing that scares a tyrant – and that’s a free and united PEOPLE. 2023 may have been a dark chapter in American history. But it also proved that there is no greater force on the face of the planet than when patriots of a nation unite to make their country great again. Now, let’s begin 2024 by showing the Democrat Dictators just how strong our movement truly is by making the FIRST DAY OF THE YEAR our strongest yet. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35137%2E120265%2EbvsNST ]Qasim for Congress

Dear Friend,

Thank you for your partnership and support in 2023. I'm grateful to go
into the new year side by side with you.

Let 2024 be the year we make seismic progress on human rights—with new
leadership who upholds principles above politics and elevates humanity
above all.

Let us never turn a blind eye to the suffering of those around us, or stay
neutral in times of great moral conflict. Let us loudly condemn injustice
wherever we see it, and loudly speak for justice even if our voices shake.

I'm running for US Congress in IL-11 on this platform of justice—and we're
just getting started. I am grateful to have your support to build a better
future committed to principles above politics and humanity above all.

From all of us at the Qasim for Congress campaign — thank you for being in
this fight for justice with us in 2024 and beyond.

Let's get to work because Justice Can't Wait.

Best regards,

— Qasim Rashid

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4699?t=1002&akid=35137%2E120265%2EbvsNST ]You can donate to our 100% people-funded campaign here.

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Our party is falling apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
CRISIS CONFIRMED: The lowest number of Americans in decades identify as Republicans, millions walking away from the Republican Party.
This is nothing short of a crisis, Peter.

Republicans are WALKING AWAY in droves from our Republican Partyparty. It is a crisis as we head into this critical presidential election year.

We need to know from you, Peter, are you walking away from the Republican Partyparty in 2024?

[**Yes, I have lost faith in Republicans ability to lead**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f306d4e132a0462fad597db2220a8e31&_e=tplGaee4v5TPzcLw6gRDpqt7So6_BgMD5wkIx8dtbLilBvdp57P-XSeJtUwCInakqVH0Q7wpx3Y8obVW2C2yYl8gzKAbs-K2AbSFclDrkhR2jJ1QFGdnJuIRhBJntItlQypsCWy00qsjTQ_K7yKXK2s7O989QJay__QA_UNAeQTQeh4gmazpWYj5Zt6h7CsiXoZ9juCFlDkGTRDhAfrNIT1x7y0iCV-vNS4V6TsxgkEULDlUZv9oPiq9S0vSdqZKqqPp2B6TReZKoN1eeWW9wzcBYE3RQ9-edEPWrNhwFd_jWLYzupyyPn2wXiGQ6i2elR6f3kG-YXVhia_NJlmPkpaVoi59cYseWyotVFGFBMjyU7840oOxbGzA8WgnqI4GuSGdKCPZZDgOLSg8Buyt8r8uiD6XMk6RYpw0Z5xuv4Qr9NdUVQkpGpo2hjf3lJRu)

[**No, I am still with Republicans FIGHTING to elect a new Majority**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f306d4e132a0462fad597db2220a8e31&_e=tplGaee4v5TPzcLw6gRDpqt7So6_BgMD5wkIx8dtbLilBvdp57P-XSeJtUwCInakqVH0Q7wpx3Y8obVW2C2yYl8gzKAbs-K2AbSFclDrkhR2jJ1QFGdnJuIRhBJntItlQypsCWy00qsjTQ_K7yKXK2s7O989QJay__QA_UNAeQTQeh4gmazpWYj5Zt6h7CsiXoZ9juCFlDkGTRDhAfrNIT1x7y0iCV-vNS4V6TsxgkEULDlUZv9oPiq9S0vSdqZKqqPp2B6TReZKoN1eeWW9wzcBYE3RQ9-edEPWrNhwFd9FjM90jQQRe448mf6RU2JaZXcmK3FKcU_eF2U2kqiRCl9Cx5SFvJvFobT-kxup96oV51rSZKPIZGdZ6GefTzsqQVxgiD3eUuMMY1wrsc4b7QPExGEBmn2PzlKkeksiWzYuo3-ebcjBoWvs2GyHyZLU)
A poll from Gallup is being used to back liberal media claims that Republicans are “leaving the Party in Droves,” and unfortunately, those claims are TRUE! We’ve confirmed this liberal media report, and it’s clear that support for Joe Biden is somehow growing.

Do you agree? [**Respond now ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f306d4e132a0462fad597db2220a8e31&_e=tplGaee4v5TPzcLw6gRDpqt7So6_BgMD5wkIx8dtbLilBvdp57P-XSeJtUwCInakqVH0Q7wpx3Y8obVW2C2yYl8gzKAbs-K2AbSFclDrkhR2jJ1QFGdnJuIRhBJntItlQypsCWy00qsjTQ_K7yKXK2s7O989QJay__QA_UNAeQTQeh4gmazpWYj5Zt6h7CsiXoZ9juCFlDkGTRDhAfrNIT1x7y0iCV-vNS4V6TsxgkEULDlUZv9oPiq9S0vSdqZKqqPp2B6TReZKoN1eeWW9wzcBYE3RQ9-edEPWrNhwFd91Kww8PfQIswHm5RZQASchZinWGMlfbfYKFZgqQxlflnXZR5-qDdueamYGPSW0e_yIJlcnwX5ViptBCOKIC_qU_U9M77LN2MfukRZnVn-wa4AJNsWtFkKFie-7TopQDCNLCHBDWV5xe76bUmcgAnTU)

Happy New Year!
Okay, here's the deal. It's a new year, so I'm going to try something new.
When I started this Substack, my intent was to use it as a forum to share unconventional perspectives and engage in interesting conversations. Although I thoroughly enjoyed writing my initial pieces here, they were fairly formal essays, and a couple of them took me a long time to draft and edit. It was all too slow.
I'm not a full-time professional writer, and it was never my desire to use this platform solely for the publication of highly refined posts. The project became more daunting than it needed to be, and I became less inclined to write here.
I'm honored that so many of you stuck around despite my absence over the past several months, and going forward I'm committed to doing things differently. While I still plan to publish many polished pieces, your expectation should be that most posts here will be short, casual notes or thoughts.
My hope with this change is to bring you more regular content, and more of what you're likely here for anyway. In any case, this is closer to what I imagined doing when this Substack adventure began. Thanks again for being a subscriber.

clean_body: Happy New Year! Okay, here's the deal. It's a new year, so I'm going to try something new. When I started this Substack, my intent was to use it as a forum to share unconventional perspectives and engage in interesting conversations. Although I thoroughly enjoyed writing my initial pieces here, they were fairly formal essays, and a couple of them took me a long time to draft and edit. It was all too slow. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | | Jan 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | Happy New Year! Okay, here's the deal. It's a new year, so I'm going to try something new. When I started this Substack, my intent was to use it as a forum to share unconventional perspectives and engage in interesting conversations. Although I thoroughly enjoyed writing my initial pieces here, they were fairly formal essays, and a couple of them took me a long time to draft and edit. It was all too slow. I'm not a full-time professional writer, and it was never my desire to use this platform solely for the publication of highly refined posts. The project became more daunting than it needed to be, and I became less inclined to write here. I'm honored that so many of you stuck around despite my absence over the past several months, and going forward I'm committed to doing things differently. While I still plan to publish many polished pieces, your expectation should be that most posts here will be short, casual notes or thoughts. My hope with this change is to bring you more regular content, and more of what you're likely here for anyway. In any case, this is closer to what I imagined doing when this Substack adventure began. Thanks again for being a subscriber. You 're currently a free subscriber to Justin Amash. If you become a paid subscriber, you'll also be able to: Access exclusive posts and podcast episodes. Access the full archive. Comment on posts. Join special events, including conversations with me on Substack Chat. * Enjoy other benefits from time to time. Thanks for making this possible! | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Justin Amash 5557 28th St SE Ste B #325, Grand Rapids, MI 49512 ? ?

# **[Police finally begin to make arrests in connection with 'smash and grab' ring that has allegedly stolen almost $500k from Ulta](http://trk.libertyledger._4wTd4rIFblh1uQyiJPwKA)**
---
After more than a year and a half of "smash and grab" style robberies in which almost half a million dollars worth of beauty merchandise was stolen across Washington state and Oregon, authorities have begun to make arrests to break up a ring of organized retail theft, according to KOMO-TV.

subject: A trip after the holidays for you and a friend! ✈︎ 🎁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f2e43b3bb174cbc3860fd5a9e4d9c22a736a693ed34567899a36ead705bd850f612e02461c6a80883c27b9f6384fc452bdf0f32cc4fb026e15ebc2ce9f94cfb9fec495608052ab2245047df85fded81e

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b234f04b7015243770470255b4187e0739ff2ae3fc2c0f9bc2b6c4dea482cf37b2c874f2519f075fe6ee80dc2c5a815584b05d854e9686372a

Hey friend,

Ron DeSantis is ready to win another big debate night on January 10th and you're invited! There is no better way to ring in the new year and get this country moving toward Election Day than being IN THE AUDIENCE at the final debate before the American People kick off the voting process.

But we see you haven't entered yet...
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b234f04b7015243770470255b4187e0739ff2ae3fc2c0f9bc2b6c4dea482cf37b2c874f2519f075fe6ee80dc2c5a815584b05d854e9686372a
Don't forget! Enter TODAY!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b234f04b7015243770470255b4187e0739ff2ae3fc2c0f9bc2b6c4dea482cf37b2c874f2519f075fe6ee80dc2c5a815584b05d854e9686372a

This debate is the very last chance the GOP candidates have to show the people of Iowa what they're made of before the first votes are cast... this is sure to be an incredible evening. We want to make sure we have a giant crowd of support and we'd love for you to come be a part of it with us for free, friend!

Happy holidays,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b234f04b7015243770470255b4187e0739ff2ae3fc2c0f9bc2b6c4dea482cf37b2c874f2519f075fe6ee80dc2c5a815584b05d854e9686372a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b265cd01aa39b1b6dff6854e68728c84d52ad9cf048104c30308156c6b520e98a3a9ddf7125aa727f71eb9fa398480cfffc3c9c23e7cfc52ff
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eee993659431e4b234f04b7015243770470255b4187e0739ff2ae3fc2c0f9bc2b6c4dea482cf37b2c874f2519f075fe6ee80dc2c5a815584b05d854e9686372a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

Hey friend, Ron DeSantis is ready to win another big debate night on January 10th and you're invited! There is no better way to ring in the new year and get this country moving toward Election Day than being IN THE AUDIENCE at the final debate before the American People kick off the voting process. But we see you haven't entered yet... Don't forget! Enter TODAY! This debate is the very last chance the GOP candidates have to show the people of Iowa what they're made of before the first votes are cast... this is sure to be an incredible evening. We want to make sure we have a giant crowd of support and we'd love for you to come be a part of it with us for free, friend! Happy holidays, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. # TUESDAY, JANUARY 2, 2024

## Bill Clinton to be Named in Epstein Docs
A federal judge ruled that sensitive documents related to Jeffery Epstein will [now be unsealed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFzgyAYh_FPgxseAlEzMHRxS9eOHsKf5M0heEhi_fa9du78LM_9vm7zzVKkdP-0K0wNebau0htzxyWXetaNNwGQUA1MNwgthe61bB7Gjr3VagS8GoMYvFyUtotD79SolesaMlJILTohO3G5iLHVQwiLuF71svTdeAlMC3iqubTPTKk-EOKZ3yity2sTzaPWbWfqg8mJyek4jjbk74Rj_-1MTis8WSanhWLkLlKqOXHySJUCwfOt4E35tceTF3jrKjx_IgQUnBzbXkGJ--xeK1LdecGWS22K8dtBMdLeD0yL-2op_g3V_3R-AgAA__9_FGoy), and the process is expected to happen this week. The documents originate from a lawsuit against Epstein's girlfriend, Ghislaine Maxwell, and they include 150+ anonymous "John or Jane Does." Former president Bill Clinton is reported to be one of them, [amongst other high-profile figures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OqzAQRp_GdEbDYH5SuLgNXW67JRrwGCYyJsJO2Lz9iq23-4pPOkfn6z7eSYLE5T9tbLPfR5qzvHmsNGo0oymc9czIdcG26sAgmNZgsdoZJ9O1nsC1vYPGubruCQi5mXvyxhRiEdBABVhB00Bfms77CW43M01t1TdeGWAneT_Kxy4xr-zDZ3_zUc77VgS75vxMqv6ncFA4nOdZ5pWXFx1OKF4fhcMr6chnUjhcLIXDg6LCAaprsvcHfzQ_U2aJelklBZLIeqPvk0PQlNI-C2VOOkjKxWHd85QQJLWdMrBsJOFXJv9V5icAAP__nIJlqw). [According to ABC News](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnMZvR-TggDAyVKrZ0qaqOyJgzucjYEXYS5e2rdu78L7--7_N8thIkbh9257H4NFtX5MGz0aiRZqrW0TMjNxWPpgdCoI6wuox8ImfJeOscDOCN71wL1DV9j9jbxVUyIiCBATTQtnCqqfd-gWGgZenMqfWKgFcp6aivSWK5sA-v9OCjdmmvwngp5ZZV86ZwUjjZxUV-5npLv1nh9PWpcHLpfhS9JnffOZaso90lbvrK3h_80nzLhSVmbXNOTmzhrO8xsw28KpxyScdLNZOsqnk30A5DYzqojnG9PSUEyV2vCLbdSvh7Kv8B_QQAAP__p7Rnlg), the documents do not necessarily contain evidence of illegal activity by Clinton, but he's reportedly named 50 times. Epstein, a convicted sex offender, was on trial for sex trafficking when he allegedly killed himself in prison, and Maxwell is currently serving a 20-year sentence for sex trafficking. Celebrities such as Prince Andrew of Britain's royal family are accused of participating in Epstein's illegal sex ring.
## Earthquake Shakes Japan
A 7.6 magnitude earthquake [struck Japan's northwestern coast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yszAQAJ8GOjyn04FQoeJr6Py1KZmTOBk54icg25O3zzh1yp0tdmY_ruOVU07r7T8v4krcRg4lPWVUDTZII9WTiyIouhanDBACdYT17IyZWBnfRw48IUqP3toAPfguWEVSJ4eABApQQdtCfyETowdryftO9W2sCGRKZTsu9y2tZZaYv7enHJewLXV2cyn7Wel_FQ4VDryv8jrf6g1HSSFLhcOdd14b4aPMXw_-lKacj5WX1PjoLXlFWmttLFllWx2N-LYPJNR19eGm_ZVyTmdnKoLbwin_lstfG34CAAD__wOCXKU), causing widespread damage. Roads, homes, and businesses were destroyed, and about 100,000 people were evacuated from the surrounding region due to a [tsunami warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOozAQgOGngc7IHmwMhYtr6HLtlWjA4zCJsTlwgvL2K6203VZ_--v7d5tuyJHT_S9u5ErIEy6F3zQpAQL0pGvvAhFQW5NTVmqQutNQrw5VMNBa6L1ahqGTLbX9YIzsWjPMNvQ1O5CgpZKgpDGyb7QNYZbDoOe5U70JlZbkueSjeWROZaUQP_lNR7PkrY5uLWU_q_ZPBWMF43VdDSdPOyVPqTRLbl7PCkY8GSsYH7hj-qkgPMr6_4VPEiV7_IhyvhJuLC48Eqe74HPlJ14oZtBWWWmatWyxPpzfL46Rz85WWt435Ph9U36j-QoAAP__ZhJlVQ). Thirty people are reported dead. Japan's nuclear industry has been under fire since 2011, when earthquakes and a tsunami caused meltdowns near Fukushima that destroyed entire towns. Last week, the government allowed the country's largest nuclear plant to resume operation (it had been shut down since 2011). No nuclear incidents have been reported thus far.
## New State Laws for January
The new year brought a slate of new state laws into effect, and some of them are controversial. In California, toy retailers are now required to have a ["gender-neutral" section](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ5nRdSzoEhjd2lTOgjLuQkHN7DR3NtnLnXqv_nm_7iuV0uR0u3d3tFwyKt1TAeunVRS6VU33gREhX2DpptAK9CjVs1usJ_HyYH3LmgYPMwe597B1js_9tt8acgoUBo6UB0MA1xaPYWwwTzrbRu7yxCEBvTEubSfmRLvGOIzH1hal-9NNDvzo4r-TahFqOU8zzbkn4RnfXWhlkeOxOSqUIuzkUIuiawMlFBWzgWr9Dmx3O2B8obJY5EJv7nYKL_IV8n5KSs6ppzkS9oU4x8nxUh1nISG291S_LPwf2N-AwAA__8qJWbh) where none of the marketing is directed at either boys or girls. New York has [banned pet stores](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvwyAUBOBfg7dnwQs28cDQxVu6drQAPxJaAhHQoPz7ylXHbp90y919XLaLCTGk67u5k24-b8a18KRNAALKTQ679kRIp4G0UFwil7PE4aYnO82SxHkxJ-Wd2ZUgq5wgr9SiFtqHoJGj5IKj4NPEz6NU3lu-LNLaWZwnzySnPbRcxs8cUruRj6_8pDK6fB-ivrX2qOz0xnBluPbex2Rdol6PnOF6kOH6XeFPiTq8cvkCa1KFBzWoLReqUCkeE8GZVmHP1wrFWBtaheKSmREXNRS9P3qIMdRZMcmvdxPib5H23ys_AQAA__-gyWUC) from selling dogs, cats, or rabbits. Governor Kathy Hochul (D) says it will reduce the harmful treatment of animals. In Michigan, sweeping [gun control legislation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LturDAQxvGnMR1oZjAXFy5OQ7enTYlsGMNE5iLwrpW3jzZSuvQ_6fv0_3iMDydR9uW_29imcIxuSvLiEUsqSY-6mG1gJq4LttiBJtCtpmK1BsmD6VrdmWCc91OPfdv2vgbPM6EvxBKQBgRCaBroK92F4MEY7X2LfROUBp4lHVf1ecieVg7x63jxVU3HVkS7pnTeqv6naFA05JyrTaZVFrffaX1u_s0UDTvnW9HgriRTZEXDryqX515Gl-_y_aPEvmnQIFbnehaXnc8sMcrddkrDsjmJP7PprwbfAQAA__-671wb) is going into effect, including a "red-flag" law and specific requirements for how guns are stored at home.

On this date in 1776, George Washington's army first raised the Grand Union Flag, newly made to represent the 2nd Continental Congress and the United Colonies. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Making a resolution to exercise more this year? LMNT is The Editor's favorite way to hydrate while working out (Or hauling dirt and rocks around with a wheelbarrow in an endless landscaping project. That counts as working out, right?) Editor's note : Today is our last shortened edition of the holiday season. We'll be back to normal tomorrow. | Bill Clinton to be Named in Epstein Docs A federal judge ruled that sensitive documents related to Jeffery Epstein will , and the process is expected to happen this week. The documents originate from a lawsuit against Epstein's girlfriend, Ghislaine Maxwell, and they include 150+ anonymous "John or Jane Does." Former president Bill Clinton is reported to be one of them, . , the documents do not necessarily contain evidence of illegal activity by Clinton, but he's reportedly named 50 times. Epstein, a convicted sex offender, was on trial for sex trafficking when he allegedly killed himself in prison, and Maxwell is currently serving a 20-year sentence for sex trafficking. Celebrities such as Prince Andrew of Britain's royal family are accused of participating in Epstein's illegal sex ring. Earthquake Shakes Japan A 7.6 magnitude earthquake , causing widespread damage. Roads, homes, and businesses were destroyed, and about 100,000 people were evacuated from the surrounding region due to a . Thirty people are reported dead. Japan's nuclear industry has been under fire since 2011, when earthquakes and a tsunami caused meltdowns near Fukushima that destroyed entire towns. Last week, the government allowed the country's largest nuclear plant to resume operation (it had been shut down since 2011). No nuclear incidents have been reported thus far. New State Laws for January The new year brought a slate of new state laws into effect, and some of them are controversial. In California, toy retailers are now required to have a where none of the marketing is directed at either boys or girls. New York has from selling dogs, cats, or rabbits. Governor Kathy Hochul (D) says it will reduce the harmful treatment of animals. In Michigan, sweeping is going into effect, including a "red-flag" law and specific requirements for how guns are stored at home. Fired leftist, Soros-backed prosecutors.

The contrast is real and that's we just released ONE MORE AD before the Iowa Caucus. We need your help to show it to every Iowan before January 15th.

Wondering where your contributions go in the final days before the Iowa Caucus? This is it it. Towards new ads that get out the voter effort!

A small donation from YOU helps us spread our ads to THOUSANDS. Winning an election is a team effort, and we only have until 1/15 to raise what we need to kick off election year with a big win at the Iowa Caucus. Please—

chip in $10 or $25 ahead of the caucus on January 15th.

- Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30990e74f741f28184cd5d9b8a75d4a0afd66748399e3845914e4de0949f2cfe34c0a36861ad374e16da29a5c42b4db52e846faff38bf66b30f8db6946d5c75a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30990e74f741f2816f094d7ed9dca025dea1eb1a8291645fc285435ded98b946536e5c1f995bf12c368d73140a3d84d499f66ba31a954e5cd169250032078baf
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30990e74f741f28184cd5d9b8a75d4a0afd66748399e3845914e4de0949f2cfe34c0a36861ad374e16da29a5c42b4db52e846faff38bf66b30f8db6946d5c75a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30990e74f741f28184cd5d9b8a75d4a0afd66748399e3845914e4de0949f2cfe34c0a36861ad374e16da29a5c42b4db52e846faff38bf66b30f8db6946d5c75a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Joe Biden and the Democrats in Congress have — - Corrupted our institutions. - Indoctrinated our kids. - Opened our border. - Weaponized government against us. - Destroyed the American dream. Meanwhile, Ron DeSantis has — - Beat the teachers union. - Beat Fauci on COVID. - Fired leftist, Soros-backed prosecutors. The contrast is real and that's we just released ONE MORE AD before the Iowa Caucus. We need your help to show it to every Iowan before January 15th. WATCH THE BRAND NEW AD NOW Wondering where your contributions go in the final days before the Iowa Caucus? This is it it. Towards new ads that get out the voter effort! A small donation from YOU helps us spread our ads to THOUSANDS. Winning an election is a team effort, and we only have until 1/15 to raise what we need to kick off election year with a big win at the Iowa Caucus. Please— chip in $10 or $25 ahead of the caucus on January 15th. - Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Beginning a new year can be a very special, productive time; a time to reflect on the old year and set goals for the new year. This year, for me, that is a much bigger task than it has ever been.
I am extremely grateful to the people of Utah's 2nd Congressional District who put their faith in me. I'm grateful for our great state. I'm grateful to live in a country that was founded on the principle of liberty, and I'm grateful for the Constitution that protects that liberty.
For those reasons, I am resolved to make this my best year yet - read my full OpEd Below:

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38525%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ESYf5BQ0%2bvzYkGQdqZfqiw&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38526%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TzwATFhHnmbhGCfjIU9qdw&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38526%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TzwATFhHnmbhGCfjIU9qdw&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Paul?=
subject: Rivalries are meant for the field, not politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Hudson for Congress]()
body:
My grandfather coached the Michigan State Spartans for 25 years. I grew up in the thick of rivalries - they belong on the field, not in our politics. | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=c7b9bc21d7&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
*|FNAME|*,
As Michiganders, we all grew up with a famous household rivalry: Michigan vs. Michigan State. In our state, this rivalry divides regions, friends, even households. It’s bragging rights for 365 days a year or until our teams meet again. At the end of the day, the clash of Spartan and Wolverine is as classic as the Great Lakes.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
My family grew up knowing this rivalry all too well. My grandfather, Duffy Daugherty, coached the Spartans for 25 years. He finished his career as a 2x National Champion, College Football Hall of famer, and is widely remembered as a pioneer of racially integrating college football.
| | | | | | | | |
---
| _Papa with George Webster, former Spartan and NFL all-star._
---
| [Learn more](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=1a8badb250&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
But rivalries aren’t built for unity or shared objectives. Don’t take my word for it, Oxford Dictionary defines ‘rivalry’ as : “competition for the same objective or for superiority in the same field.”
Rivalry belongs on the field. Not in our politics.
| [DONATE](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=96d80b1ddf&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
We deserve a government that shares an objective - to ensure the safety and wellbeing of the American people. A government, with elected officials who share a mission and go to work each day to face the country’s challenges, together. Frustratingly, our politics just aren’t working.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
That is precisely why I entered this race. To restore faith that the values of great Michiganders like my Grandfather and Gerald Ford are still alive. Values like integrity, responsibility, and selflessness.
In Michigan, rivalries are just a part of our daily lives. But it’s time we send the right people to Washington, DC who can set those rivalries aside and get the job done.
Humbly,**\- Paul Hudson**
| | | | [](mailto:teamhudson@paulhudsonforcongress.com)| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=d79e2f94e3&e=26f66c7cbd)| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=993d43756e&e=26f66c7cbd)| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=4c1b323f03&e=26f66c7cbd)| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=b0bfa3fbcd&e=26f66c7cbd)

Just imagine the media outrage if someone said those things about a Democrat! https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71ac29395efdc1931f3893eeeb74544d324686dcc755e0ee412c499aa78401cced53ff7707a38632725657bc8250c653781 I’m George Logan. My grandparents left Jamaica for Guatemala during the Great Depression, and like so many other American families, my parents left Guatemala and came to the United States of America to grow a family and build a better life. Now, I’m a Republican, family man, engineer, community leader, and small business owner running in the most important Congressional race in the entire country. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 Last year, the Democrats used their lies and dirty tricks to defeat me by just 2,000 votes, but they aren’t going to scare me away by calling me names. I just announced my campaign to force a rematch with my far-Left Democrat opponent and bring fresh leadership to Congress, and https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 I’m personally inviting you to become a Founding Member of my campaign. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 STAND WITH GEORGE LOGAN https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER I know we have a real fight ahead, which is why I’m hoping to have your support in this race. The Democrat Machine is going to do whatever it takes to defeat me, and they have millions in the bank to spend against me. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 So I’m counting on proud Americans just like you to help us win this critical race! I may not fit in the Democrats’ box of a “typical Republican,” but I can assure you that no one will work harder to get our Nation back on track than I will. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71a45b3148718999eb5e40ab3b1199613929e90a323223eb1f8b305c106f485bbb5463cdbecad2b339eb53d5347e00e0ee0 But we will only be successful if you step up and join our campaign today! Thanks in advance for standing by my side! - George https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71ac29395efdc1931f3893eeeb74544d324686dcc755e0ee412c499aa78401cced53ff7707a38632725657bc8250c653781 Paid for George Logan For Congress 26 Catoonah Street Box 72 Ridgefield, CT, 06877 https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=d5da69ade3c8f71adb0358f67c507e17b144ffad611921d614f15b92f2259b90ab0194119eb0f34a65bb23bd866b9be23ca8c6b8355623bb Privacy Policy To unsubscribe from GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS, click here

name: =?utf-8?Q?Delegate=20Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: Thank You from Karen Greenhalgh
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate_
body:
It has been my honor to serve Virginia Beach in the House of Delegates. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/190fee72564e/thank-you-from-karen-greenhalgh?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Dearest Friends,

Our District Office is closed, and I have made my final trip to Richmond as your elected representative. But I write to you today not with disappointment, but with a profound and overflowing gratitude.

You, the incredible people who believed in me, who donated and walked with me, who shared my vision and raised your voices in support, have given me the greatest honor of my life. The opportunity to serve you, to be a voice for your hopes and concerns, to strive to make our city a better place – that is a privilege I will cherish forever.

Your stories, your struggles, your hopes – all were woven into the very fabric of my service. We shared dreams and found common ground, we built bridges of understanding to replace division, we accomplished change where there was no hope. You knew and trusted me, supported and encouraged me, as we worked together for the Virginia we love.

As I stood alone in Richmond for the right of women and girls to compete fairly, you were standing with me. You supported me as I worked with members of both parties, passing legislation to assist parents and students, teachers and military, individuals and businesses.

We accomplished much in Richmond, but just as much right here in Virginia Beach! I have constituents who had given up hope in their battles against the VEC and DMV, against unethical banks and healthcare providers, struggling in so many unique situations. To be able to fight for people who had been ignored, to speak up for those who had no voice, was a privilege I will never forget. We are a team that made a tremendous impact for Virginians.
And for that, I will forever be grateful.
---
| |
---

So, with a heart full of appreciation and a smile on my face, I thank you.
Thank you for standing with me,

Thank you for believing in me,

Thank you for making this journey with me.
---
| The greatest honor has been serving alongside you, and I cannot wait to see what we accomplish together, in whatever form our next chapter takes.

With unyielding optimism and deepest gratitude,
---
|
---
| Delegate Karen Greenhalgh
---
| |
---
| _Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate_

**Our mailing address is:**
Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate IncPO Box 62945Virginia Beach, VA 23466-2945
[Add us to your address book](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2a3d326c92)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2a3d326c92&e=48b883ea87&c=e187d19235) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2a3d326c92&e=48b883ea87&c=e187d19235).

Fellow American, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life ... _yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it!_ **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith—like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can’t be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** —IMPOSSIBLE to pursue... ...and leave Christians and Americans of faith alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools without ANY legal defense when they wrongly, and unconstitutionally, face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Fellow American, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** **[**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-MkXwdT5yQOCjDDQyII_A)**
---
[Support Christian Legal Society](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has _devastating_ real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys**—**and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend** —**seems to be the _sole goal_ of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed ... without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that **radical activists could use this to** :
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as “progressive” or “Woke”);

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches** , sitting on church boards, or serving schools they’ve gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing _pro bono_ work to defend religious freedom **on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Fellow American, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America ... but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight—and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith—I'm counting on your support. **[**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys ... and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._XANy1TJBN9NanNDXA)**
---
[Support Christian Legal Society](http://trk.secureandprosper._phZqd90lIif0v_F_4UhQ)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society’s Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans’ inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.**
[**That's why I encourage you** —**and hope** —**that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-myHpA2HgE9KlUg) Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEOChristian Legal Society
---
[Support Christian Legal Society](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712
---

body:

Dear Peter,
Time to celebrate YOU!
YOU are the reason we can pop the champagne.
You see, we crossed $6,000,000 in the Fourth Quarter and it’s all because of you.
This achievement will put to rest the establishment parties’ wishful thinking that our campaign has no staying power.
Achieving this early show of strength will tell the mainstream, out-of-touch political parties something they don’t want to hear: **_The Republicans and the Democrats are _not_ the only game in town._**
The people are rising up, they are resisting, and they are voting with their pocket books to support an Independent candidate for President.
Make no mistake, meeting this goal will only add fuel to the firestorm sweeping the nation.
There is an unmistakable desire to reshape America, to build and protect a vibrant Middle Class, to protect our rights, to support young families in search for affordable housing, to recall our military men and women home from abroad, and to restore the industrial manufacturing base of the United States.
We have done it before, and with your help in 2024, we can do it again.
Thank you and stay tuned!
Team Kennedy

name: American Update
subject: Don’t Buy Into The Media’s Narrative On Congress
body:
And Biden Admin Caught And Released Enough Illegal Immigrants At The Border To Fill More Than 17 Yankee Stadiums

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689804%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oruKAh3355GXnXa3jPfY1A&sysid=1 Don’t Buy Into The Media’s Narrative On Congress

A recent headline in The New York Times blared: “House Dysfunction by the Numbers: 724 Votes, Only 27 Laws Enacted,” while another publication called the 118th Congress “the least productive Congress since the 1930s.” The bleak picture they paint ignores a crucial point: Congress is functioning largely as America’s Founding Fathers intended.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689804%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oruKAh3355GXnXa3jPfY1A&sysid=1

The number of illegal immigrants caught and released into the country in 2023 would be enough to fill Yankee Stadium more than 17 times, according to federal data. Border Patrol recorded more than 1.7 million encounters with migrants crossing the southern border illegally in 2023, with more than 824,000 released into the interior of the []

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689815%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xd1CLNnTmeQycZD4ELecOg&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CqJEoTA51Y7pxUXc9uAxzA&sysid=1 The US Rings In The New Year Facing Milestone For Massive Federal Debt

The U.S. is facing $34 trillion in debt going into 2024 as deficits continue to increase under President Joe Biden. As of Dec. 28, 2023, the federal government owed $33.91 trillion in debt, with around $7 trillion of that being intragovernmental and the other $26.9 trillion being debt held by the public, according to the Treasury Department.

name: Lucy McBath
subject: This is disastrous for Georgia voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I refuse to let Republicans remove me from Congress
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ba0a51c-b7c9-4a64-a3a5-d1261e4a9c15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ad3971c-9826-4567-84bd-df929c64013f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Peter, a federal judge just ruled in favor of the new Georgia Congressional maps moving the district I represent over 20 points to Trump.** _This will be a longer email as I explain how we got here and what this means._ [**If you don’t feel like reading the whole thing, you can click here to support my campaign and Blue Amp Action as I’ll need all the help I can get to return to Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54f8f0a3-3f8c-408e-8a95-c84a0aa74e87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Earlier in December, the Republican-controlled Georgia state legislature redrew our Congressional maps. _In a blatant attempt to force me out of my seat, they gerrymandered the district I represent to favor the GOP by +20 points._ Alongside many voting rights organizations and activists, I vowed to fight against these new maps passing. **But on 12/28, the federal court made its ruling in favor of these maps.** I won’t sugarcoat it, Peter: this is a disastrous outcome for voting rights and democracy. However – I refuse to sit back quietly and let Republicans get their way. _I made a promise that I won’t stop fighting in Congress until my communities are kept safe and protected._ I won’t let the GOP decide when my time in Congress is over. Let’s recall that this is the _**second time**_ Georgia Republicans have drawn a district I represent over 20 points to Donald Trump. **I’m fully prepared to return to Congress in 2024.** [**But Peter, I’d be lying if I told you it’s an easy path ahead of me. I only have a few months before this next election, and we need to put my campaign into overdrive. Can you rush a donation ASAP to Blue Amp Action and myself before the end-of-year deadline on Sunday to help make sure I can continue leading the gun safety movement in Congress?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T613060d7-d74f-42b8-bc2b-42412c95a295/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bc6f69e-96fa-4584-80d7-55729c5f9043/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Now more than ever, I need my grassroots movement behind me. The stakes are high and I hope I can count on your support.

| | |

|

| | | | | Let's do this, Lucy McBath [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc01011f6-5751-4afc-a4e6-a9d18e7a296a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: I refuse to let Republicans remove me from Congress | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Peter, a federal judge just ruled in favor of the new Georgia Congressional maps moving the district I represent over 20 points to Trump. This will be a longer email as I explain how we got here and what this means. Earlier in December, the Republican-controlled Georgia state legislature redrew our Congressional maps. In a blatant attempt to force me out of my seat, they gerrymandered the district I represent to favor the GOP by +20 points. Alongside many voting rights organizations and activists, I vowed to fight against these new maps passing. But on 12/28, the federal court made its ruling in favor of these maps. I won’t sugarcoat it, Peter: this is a disastrous outcome for voting rights and democracy. However – I refuse to sit back quietly and let Republicans get their way. I made a promise that I won’t stop fighting in Congress until my communities are kept safe and protected. I won’t let the GOP decide when my time in Congress is over. Let’s recall that this is the second time Georgia Republicans have drawn a district I represent over 20 points to Donald Trump. I’m fully prepared to return to Congress in 2024. | | | | | | | | Now more than ever, I need my grassroots movement behind me. The stakes are high and I hope I can count on your support. | | | | | | | | | Let's do this, Lucy McBath | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

The U.S. is facing $34 trillion in debt going into 2024 as deficits
continue to increase under President Joe Biden. As of Dec. 28, 2023,
the federal government owed $33.91 trillion in debt, with around $7
trillion of that being intragovernmental and the other $26.9 trillion
being debt held by the public, according to the Treasury Department.

Elon Musk And His Businesses Faced Multi-Agency Crackdown From Biden
Admin In 2023

In the first full year of Elon Musk’s ownership of Twitter — now X,
President Joe Biden’s administration repeatedly targeted the
billionaire and his companies, taking regulatory action against them
throughout 2023. Several agencies under the Biden administration
launched investigations and instituted other consequential reviews
into Musk’s businesses.

name: Tina
subject: Happy New Year -- 2024 is HERE!
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy New Year! It's time to get our Volunteer A-Team re-enlisted for March 5. First, thank you so much for having been a campaign volunteer in the past and/or for signing up recently to help us WIN on MARCH 5.

To recap, _**the winner of this Primary WILL become the next Congressman in District 6**_. If you have somehow missed the new district map, here it is:

You can help make calls for Colonel Castelli from anywhere, so it is not necessary to be in District for that.

If you would like to display a yard sign, we ask that you do live in district, or very nearby. If you are not sure whether you live in or near the District, you can [check your address here](https://ncleg.gov/Redistricting/DistrictPlanMap/C2023E).

Last, please _**reply back to me with any updated contact information**_ and verify your volunteer interest area:

I can't wait to do the following to Elect Christian Castelli:
1. Make Phone Calls (using our mobile phone app)
2. Knock Doors (using our mobile phone app)
3. Host a fundraiser in my neighborhood
4. Display a yard sign
5. Other: please specify

We will begin television advertising very soon. To help get the Colonel's qualifications and experience out to as many voters as possible, we always need financial donations. If you or anyone you know can help in that way, [please donate at this link.](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

[Tina Forsberg](mailto:tina@castellifornc.com?subject=I%20am%20enlisting%20in%20Castelli's%20A-Team%202024&body=Tina%2C%0A%0APlease%20sign%20me%20up%20to%3A%0A%0AMake%20phone%20calls%20-%20%20%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20can%20commit%20to%20this%20many%20hours%20per%20week%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20do%20%2F%20do%20not%20need%20training%20on%20Campaign%20Sidekick%0A%0AKnock%20on%20doors%20-%20%20%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20can%20commit%20to%20this%20many%20doors%20per%20week%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20do%20%2F%20do%20not%20need%20training%20on%20Campaign%20Sidekick%0A%0AHost%20a%20fundraiser%20-%20%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20can%20get%20this%20many%20people%20to%20donate%20at%20least%20%24100%20each%3A%0A%0ADisplay%20a%20yard%20sign%20-%20%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20live%20in%20the%20district%20and%20can%20display%20a%20yard%20sign.%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20I%20live%20in%20the%20district%20and%20can%20serve%20as%20a%20sign%20and%20literature%20distributor.%0A%0AOther%20questions%2Fcomments%3A%0A%0A) <= hit="" this="" link="" to="" email="" me="">
Campaign Manager
Castelli for NC-06
<https://castellifornc.com>
336-810-8100
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **tina@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=cd726b7b-cd50-4e8d-8f8e-da4f4e21a7e9).

Friend - we're conducting a survey and we need our Republican
representatives to weigh in. We're looking to YOU to gather input
on the impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden. Can you complete our
critical survey as soon as you get a minute?

Thank you,

Official DeSantis Survey Team

--------Forwarded Message--------

From: Official DeSantis Survey Team

Subject: Impeachment Questionnaire*

Friend,

We're reaching out to the team to hear your thoughts on the
impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden. Where do you stand on each of
these issues?

Impeachment Questionnaire

Click 🔲 to respond

🔲 Do you believe Joe Biden has colluded with Hunter Biden?

🔲 Do you think Joe Biden's actions are worthy of impeachment?

🔲 Do you believe Congress should pursue impeaching Joe Biden?

🔲 Do you think Joe Biden has committed criminal acts against
the American people?

🔲 Do you believe Joe Biden should continue to represent the
United States of America?

We
need your answers, Friend. Please respond today and let us know
where you stand.

Thanks,

DeSantis Survey Team

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.
