disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY ()
body:
Happy Holiday Hiatus

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12671664?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=6943ef2e73-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-6943ef2e73-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------
Happy Holidays!! Kinda of generic...that just doesn't feel right.

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year Nebraska...that's better!!

2024 is going to be a busy year politically. But, I also think there is appropriate preparation that must be done for our families sake, mental sake, spiritual sake, and physical sake. We must use the NEW Year to bring NEW habits or routines if expecting different outcomes. This means discussions on what is happening locally and nationally and it's time to dive into the details for us to see the greater picture.

I used this last week to focus on my business as December is a crazy time and New Years Eve is one of the busiest days for a restaurant. Year end analysis takes up most of restaurant owners first week in January as well.

However, I look forward to connecting again next week. Until then I leave you with the His words...

"But don't just listen to God's word. You must do what it says. Otherwise, you are only fooling yourselves. For if you listen to the word and don't obey, it is like glancing at your face in a mirror. You see yourself, walk away, and forget what you look like."

James 1:22-24
The Biblical truth shall set us free.

Blessings,
–Chairman Underwood

2024 NEGOP VISION

In 2024, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2024 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican.

The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence.

The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2024 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles. 2024 is a victory we can all share in. Americans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say!

I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They are creating stability within this organization. Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts.

I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do.

These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards.

We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’.

–Chairman Underwood

name: Steve Scalise
subject: It’s official. I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just went on record – I endorsed Donald J. Trump for president.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**I have a big announcement - I am OFFICIALLY endorsing Donald J. Trump for president.**

He's the right man for the job. No one else can stick it to the Liberal Media like he can... No one else can unite our Party... And no one but my friend, President Trump, has the grit and determination to take down the Democrat Machine once and for all...

**[That's why he has my FULL SUPPORT. And now that I've proudly endorsed him, I'd like to let you in on our plan to save our country.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8riv9bh44cqne60b27d86sglcfrb8s1hmo680io_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "That’s why he has my FULL SUPPORT. And now that I’ve proudly endorsed him, I’d like to let you in on our plan to save our country.")**

I am 100% sure President Trump can win back the White House. When he does, he'll need a Conservative House Majority working alongside him or the Democrats will use their power to obstruct, investigate, block, defund, or impeach - ANYTHING to stop President Trump from Making America Great Again.

_That 's never going to happen - not if I have anything to say about it!_

I am putting together a team of Pro-Trump American heroes to start 2024 off with a BANG. I am asking at least 15,000 Patriots to pitch in a few bucks before midnight and help make this our biggest fundraising day since Trump was in the White House. **[Together, we'll make history and hand a HUMILIATING defeat to Joe Biden and the Democrat Machine.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo2aqanhqi1bnka6i6dnr4186m8ubm1st1js4i8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "Together, we’ll make history and hand a HUMILIATING defeat to Joe Biden and the Democrat Machine.")**
**BREAKING NEWS: STEVE SCALISE ENDORSES
DONALD J. TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoak4o34kuejk1doae3eda3fgsg7t6fhlr1lf1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs)
---
| | | [MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z81pgs7vomar53e2ra5cmo73stdkgtfoek7r0t30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US")
---
Look,

We are officially less than a year out from the most important election of our lifetimes. It may seem like that's a long way off but I assure you, _this is the point of the year when elections are won and lost. Here 's what we're up against:_

- The Democrat Machine already outraised us by $40,000,000+
- They've spent a QUARTER BILLION DOLLARS against us
- Joe Biden is plastering the airwaves with negative ads

If there was ever a moment for the Republican Party to come together and fight back...

**IT IS RIGHT NOW!!!**

**[I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump. He needs us to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and work together to win back the White House. With your help, we'll shatter our fundraising goal and make history.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z77jqrrs5ds1s0iomg36kgs4orqi3kcmnc8c9298_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump. He needs us to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and work together to win back the White House. With your help, we’ll shatter our fundraising goal and make history.")**

The deadline is midnight. Are you with us?
---
| | | [MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0p3hpdce2k0gha5lfn776e334m9qvhuoh7dol8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US")
---
Thanks for all you do.

Steve Scalise
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ksr3iuovhg0c127dhe26f5gflp41d7eql083rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

I'm launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd43porvtk266qflnn6ig58cv48ggpnm9fneukv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z40p94e2ekb2i6r4j739ak47eebftr6ncc9clbfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6co72c9h2bs "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
I wanted to share some important upcoming dates with you.
_**January 4, 2024 at 6:30 PM**_ **Montgomery County Eagle Forum Candidate Forum** Grace Woodlands 24400 Interstate 45 N The Woodlands, TX 77386
Fun fact - my opponent declined the invitation to share the stage with me and take audience questions... but I'll be there.
_**January 6, 2024 at 4:00 PM**_ **J6 Prayer Rally & Potluck** 2655 FM 1488 Conroe, TX 77384

_**January 27, 2024 at 6:30 PM**_ **MoCo Freedom Caucus Rocks The Vote** Moonshine Deck 6446 Old FM 1488 Magnolia, TX 77354

name: Tony Gonzales
subject: Mayorkas and Biden MUST GO!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**
body:
The open southern border is dragging our country back into the stone age.

---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7rv4s1j5t9ngobvfgkkaoriak6rd9frcq9eag0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6aor1c9h2bs)
---
**The open southern border is dragging our country back into the stone age.**

_**One of the BIGGEST migrant caravans ever recorded is headed STRAIGHT for our southern border.

**_ _**Thousands of Americans are dying monthly from fentanyl crossing our border.

**__**Dozens more are being murdered by illegals for sport.**_

Meanwhile, Biden and Mayorkas still haven’t done anything to stop any of it.

_**Over 1.8 MILLION Illegals have entered our country since 2020.

**_ _**Deportations are down 73%.**_

It’s clear: Biden and Mayorkas have FAILED to protect America.

**All of this could end TODAY with REAL leadership in D.C - and it starts NOW.**

Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen.
My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zleagcqfsm742kc4di9pvt0k0ohk7bngdphtcoeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0034h0pun8j2jfk0941ceccqsi59vgqt9j4bt38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5cnsarv4n88kjeicbsh7jqbnupmn783pibr2u7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znei6p4edrc8oi8vg9734hl1vt5kaiqo3eillul8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs34q0el62cibgp9qgflu3s51tth7190m7vp1rrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqc1avgpuppac0vhrqddebu9mbirt3pvrlto7js8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdn49ln17t1dktcm0lna7ul67hait01a33kvk2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znaqstn4mlgqsnth1o595a0os6g38uanvh42f2ko_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3f55efa0h7k4oqg0rkmclned68g5jqgslcvhao_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zajgr1ptfvmb734cv3pj3qcf4ecjp0njsmquc44o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgu4e4tbse5fogp5arkbjlu3e716vltk35lt958_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z63g32kfhdp23ulufa27dherv8m2m36cnsl900f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9o5tk0st0rs9llvm0firshu73f7gag7qqv0fg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrgjpfrid64tsd2b63thb5vfr2psogb1bue05oio_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2qlj3mkk6sgr91h26kseap9farsrnp395312m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h6eob2c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: We stand together for Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter — Time to share some exciting news. I just finished a call with my finance team, and we **crushed our $100,000** end-of-year goal!

This is great news that happened because of YOU. Our momentum is growing, and we have an amazing opportunity to build on it in 2024. I am incredibly grateful for your support, not only for me but for my vision of this campaign — **a vision of a Texas where everyone can thrive.**

Each fundraising deadline you’ve helped my team meet shows our collective strength. We stand together to end gun violence. We stand together for affordable healthcare. We stand together to defend abortion rights. **We stand together for Texas 32.**

I express my deepest gratitude for your continued support, and I am excited to continue this journey with you in the new year. I wish you and your family the best for a safe, healthy, and prosperous 2024.

Onward!

Brian

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: It’s all because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, With every challenge and every roadblock of 2023, true patriots like you rose up to the challenge and helped push our team to success despite all odds. _Even when the cards were stacked against us, I knew I could always count on our grassroots team._

There is so much to be done in 2024, but I wanted to take this time to reflect on how much it truly means to me to serve you in Congress. This is not a task I take lightly, and I can’t wait to start working to further our conservative mission and protect our House majority in 2024. **I am honored to stand on the frontlines with you in this fight for our nation’s future.**
---

body:

**The open southern border is dragging our country back into the stone age.**

_**One of the BIGGEST migrant caravans ever recorded is headed STRAIGHT for our southern border.

**_ _**Thousands of Americans are dying monthly from fentanyl crossing our border.

**__**Dozens more are being murdered by illegals for sport.**_

Meanwhile, Biden and Mayorkas still haven’t done anything to stop any of it.

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: we warned you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
I hate that we were right about this

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2ppr6hlnusbe1qpqcgh07ntkh6gov80uqpdfq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h69oj6clh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I hate that we were right about this.

As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we’ve been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism...
** _And now, our worst fears came true._** Soros-funded activists secured victory when two states recently **disqualified** the former president from appearing on the 2024 presidential primary ballot.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zikngto6u5atpsnscfl4r9460a07rpgj832lklog_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h69oj6clh2bs)
---
It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these.

**We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.**

_**[Fair Courts America exists to put a stop to all that.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3hdl6pj6njvfe21h8jbjebt7868cb6hegej5lo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9h69oj6clh2bs)**_

We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can’t use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies.

If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It’s as simple as that.

**As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it’s too late?**
---

name: Team Emerge
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76344208/447253930/-1986725772?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1395-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyMTZkMjI5LThjYTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lfpf9jkVmIyepx1hwUHi6xVADHtfQe6t-xHo0C8NO9s=)
---
Peter,
Thank you for being part of our Emerge community. Your support helped us to finish 2023 strong and set a solid foundation for our work in the year ahead. **Looking forward, we have some serious victories to build on – and we’re thrilled that you’re a part of the team.**
Emerge is working toward deep political transformation, and with your support, we will build on our historic success last year – and continue our work to recruit, train, and elect bold Democratic women in 2024 and beyond.

To date, Emerge has trained more than 6,000 Democratic women to run for office at every level of our government, from school boards to Congress. More than 1,200 Emerge women are serving in office right now, and in last year's elections, we achieved a historic 74 percent win rate!
By championing leaders of the New American Majority – Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women, who are at the forefront of every major issue we face today – **we’re fighting back against far-right hate and charting a better way forward for our country.**
**But none of this work would be possible without you. **Thank you for being a part of this movement, and for investing in the leadership we all deserve.
With gratitude,

Team Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76344210/447253932/-1986725772?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1395-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyMTZkMjI5LThjYTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lfpf9jkVmIyepx1hwUHi6xVADHtfQe6t-xHo0C8NO9s=)
---

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b7890ca9cad4d5e992c696ab7013902&_e=Y8SHIS3piuf_Y-KSnhia1Oha_HT5JRfLvL9yifqYOG_-TyKNP7TZlqzUuTAxu0bAxXSZjNWm5INnXQDaLYnUI-QzY39Y074Zms9cc-pcg05YV1cTd5fU4lBHOtnf69RpwqtYn87jfmgxdoC1VYS3_6dygckIDlhqWYeNcYBwYsFBsSfIJ7XjavUYl_KMOULxltp1Q3mZWfbAEk9E1LvjwaYy20wqz72shsOCwc3PbBasdm1ngU0UZ3bNJmCg8GbIEJgXUxQaH0mExqf9BzSKekjdvb_4GL_DBx_41MeLm9JjOsGxumOMjw7WiOM6ZdYSUITZrc-CD5vJLec--0WteT1zP8eaXFqdYKjSPUzZz975wk2Y9YOiOvrT_2d1KPui96f4a0U_BdqtnKSCST1CAQ2u4Tp5mnVGRPBsUunHz4iK5l8N_EAwAG1K0xq5ViWT)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b7890ca9cad4d5e992c696ab7013902&_e=Y8SHIS3piuf_Y-KSnhia1Oha_HT5JRfLvL9yifqYOG_-TyKNP7TZlqzUuTAxu0bAxXSZjNWm5INnXQDaLYnUI-QzY39Y074Zms9cc-pcg05YV1cTd5fU4lBHOtnf69RpwqtYn87jfmgxdoC1VYS3_6dygckIDlhqWYeNcYBwYsFBsSfIJ7XjavUYl_KMOULxltp1Q3mZWfbAEk9E1LvjwaYy20wqz72shsOCwc3PbBasdm1ngU0UZ3bNJmCg8GbIEJgXUxQaH0mExqf9BzSKekjdvb_4GL_DBx_41MeLm9LvudN9Ihw-TQF8fWgjNaow-Oy7RrltAuSr5ds0Qv0Po7GxCYoUaJIqWFaHXy0WVg-co3g9g9z9vqN8IVmUz7Z91Bf7BENVsAhE4-8gE0QgOOhGwaX1tY03d-wyNrX30qTh0etLRFfjYqfCoqs2HUGw)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b7890ca9cad4d5e992c696ab7013902&_e=Y8SHIS3piuf_Y-KSnhia1Oha_HT5JRfLvL9yifqYOG_-TyKNP7TZlqzUuTAxu0bAxXSZjNWm5INnXQDaLYnUI-QzY39Y074Zms9cc-pcg05YV1cTd5fU4lBHOtnf69RpwqtYn87jfmgxdoC1VYS3_6dygckIDlhqWYeNcYBwYsFBsSfIJ7XjavUYl_KMOULxltp1Q3mZWfbAEk9E1LvjwaYy20wqz72shsOCwc3PbBasdm1ngU0UZ3bNJmCg8GbIEJgXUxQaH0mExqf9BzSKekjdvb_4GL_DBx_41MeLm9KIF69Fy7Z5HtvtKLb_lCk3NK3jofOPNo7Chp_P3OoImWC-hZlED5npukDlJPRx6NLrHKwM3KAVRFd9BVnZknsShhNaFFU0BJHs0RYyhijB4eVLhQpb-GFKr91CUrGSpCKlz5uRWCtOH-P87etVtX1z)
---

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b7890ca9cad4d5e992c696ab7013902&_e=Y8SHIS3piuf_Y-KSnhia1Oha_HT5JRfLvL9yifqYOG_-TyKNP7TZlqzUuTAxu0bAxXSZjNWm5INnXQDaLYnUI-QzY39Y074Zms9cc-pcg05YV1cTd5fU4lBHOtnf69RpwqtYn87jfmgxdoC1VYS3_6dygckIDlhqWYeNcYBwYsFBsSfIJ7XjavUYl_KMOULxltp1Q3mZWfbAEk9E1LvjwaYy20wqz72shsOCwc3PbBasdm1ngU0UZ3bNJmCg8GbIEJgXUxQaH0mExqf9BzSKekjdvb_4GL_DBx_41MeLm9J37XUoOBB3fDw71OzNyqEChKfPT74Y8vAfHPDA8sapXvNinw_AdQoOXY868WPn1jdH5H-2S2Nrwm0MFVMBm-2YMBl37gJ2VLyvOx65YU9Vyj6-t7rqGd5Tjj6BtpfF0yUNuNCnHR4zrEDaBbaONr1Y)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b7890ca9cad4d5e992c696ab7013902&_e=Y8SHIS3piuf_Y-KSnhia1Oha_HT5JRfLvL9yifqYOG_-TyKNP7TZlqzUuTAxu0bAxXSZjNWm5INnXQDaLYnUI-QzY39Y074Zms9cc-pcg05YV1cTd5fU4lBHOtnf69RpwqtYn87jfmgxdoC1VYS3_6dygckIDlhqWYeNcYBwYsFBsSfIJ7XjavUYl_KMOULxltp1Q3mZWfbAEk9E1LvjwaYy20wqz72shsOCwc3PbBasdm1ngU0UZ3bNJmCg8GbIEJgXUxQaH0mExqf9BzSKekjdvb_4GL_DBx_41MeLm9IJ4IwWt61a77o2zdI4sNZbjUvKBf57HD9qeOtmJ112RB4EnM_7_pceR_O78e3EZx8YaOzm7cgs8iqKwGTfMq-wOA7KLTk7jZce9AuWR4NmG0-HFwzky10P5m8gpmS1ueu2ApA4LSWbzyL9WyAiBvtC)

| | Friend,
---
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6d5v4gjbkd6ab8cpng80knp0tlv8dib4fn5foo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j68o36cth2bs)
---
**[Friend, can I count on YOUR gift right now to help support this MASSIVE and GAME-CHANGING ballot-chasing initiative?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuor1s1s9g115k571smmh83lq1h6btduc6ke0q2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j68o36cth2bs)** For every dollar you donate, you'll help Turning Point Action put MORE boots on the ground, knock on MORE doors, and turn out MORE voters in the must-win precincts and states in the 2024 Election.
---

For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the ballot game. As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots from Conservative voters were cast and delivered. That's why, despite conservative majorities in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we didn't secure the victories we needed. But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. [**Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on grassroots patriots like YOU for support.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkn3lqtdvvj3kqv01nv4e6ercojrkc9uhmua2hj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j68o36cth2bs)

---
| | Imagine the impact of: • THOUSANDS of patriotic voters reached and registered, • HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS of voters getting to their polling locations or casting their ballots by mail, and • getting out the vote to WIN BIG for True Conservative Principles in Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and beyond in 2024. **[Friend, your support can be the DECIDING FACTOR in how many voters that Turning Point Action is able to reach, register, and TURN OUT to vote in 2024 -- please, make your gift right now to help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgk9vf4vsj4ci2u9m4aoshg8jsresig516fpt1ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j68o36cth2bs)** Thank you for standing with me and Turning Point Action. I hope you're proud of the work you're already accomplishing to help SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left, and I can't wait to see how much more we're able to do for America's future in the year to come.

For America, Charlie Kirk Founder Turning Point Action

name: Bob Lorinser (Personal)
subject: No subject
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friend, like anyone, I am imperfect.
Friend,
As we begin 2024, I want to express my personal gratitude to you and your family.
In a democratic society, the election of politicians is not just about them but about you. As voters, we have the power to shape the leadership that reflects our values and beliefs. Our democracy thrives when we are all informed and politically active.
**I am grateful for your activism, support, loyalty, and generosity.**
To safeguard our democracy, we must seek truth over falsehood, compassion over heartlessness, and strive for justice and integrity.
As we embark on the election year, you have a choice. You can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oSfYGVzcNUeEwZyqlSOg5Q2?unsubscribedata=WuRsxAJ1t1czFarKMLl%2FBtHtqiaTUAkmE0AUhwGWA6MiaRI1NMcwKuM1t2%2FOQOP5u0APIWWK6Wn3zJWp4J9cCPNnTecND3uO4OB2WtgAIvrE254DHwNsv2Pt8Bi9DBHb%2BHNPLU80eBLyfTKgWs2HR2WEJhn2gxkUJXQ%2BDVnfgC%2B%2BsQcnv3i5qnwNaNXjUhq8R%2B%2B9%2FkJ662PgfrqHYKB91LvhEeMDqBhrRUOrC%2Bj%2BCyc6ph0rMKb5p8G1AbNFn3EgdzbiblitHIaeew98CytgfYg8ph1VUCGIuNGCOcixTCmB9V8he5Hj0jBG2FvxFWPtB6C%2BhT8l4yfyVd%2FA8sFEmBd2193QDE%2B1aTnnCv0kLVXtTd4xa09MThHLzWDwsK%2Fp4WF9fOJsItPfECadj8VaJkmTsQ0TRVWw4l%2BgtebLx3Fm1l%2B%2B9DA4rc%2BpNe15ZKgo) from the political process, [or contribute and stay engaged](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76345803/447258746/1010418274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIwNjE5ZC04ZmE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djJQUgBXW-Q9EEeW_Qhxv6DFyPW73zXX0-kzcsQzjLM=). Friend, I realize that expecting a candidate who perfectly matches 100% of everything you want may be unrealistic, and, like any candidate, I am imperfect. Instead of holding back or lamenting on that, your active participation ensures I hear your voice, and I'm grateful for it.
Not participating in the electoral process would be a vote against the very principles for which our nation stands.
I appreciate our engagement. I will continue to be available to you because **our conversations help me be better.** **No single person knows what we all know together** , and your feedback is crucial in developing a fair and just political platform for everyone.
I strive to offer you the principles that align with our democracy, and promise to represent you to the best of my ability. I am committed to applying our collective knowledge and courage to the job, and will always vote with you and for you.
Thank you for standing in my corner in this fight.
Onward,
Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
bob@votedrbob.com
906.250.9774
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_e=fDOpFcnV2k8qiBwQizzWtJ93WAOyGX8-TRgNqZMT_0sIfM_kEFWLObenAiUaniYr__N_5q5aQekmODJk_rZKg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_e=fDOpFcnV2k8qiBwQizzWtJ93WAOyGX8-TRgNqZMT_0sIfM_kEFWLObenAiUaniYr_32jHK0iJaJB4B1NSZVOMufL2D0gcAMED7I01PfeEq3pInv6bFqVBrge724PvZJpsy0aI865O7zpXOFUqtqYrAqwjQwJLBamrsWZbl3qd8Q23mqUbHpemoPal7DGfEf0eCi47vUJIdEMjmielkwYOWcdcTle77dKMIWtOSrBFiaCqVkR8-1y_3i2KbHSWhXnGCebvfywIeacNscI-CujbHo9HTJTr8TuEpBiBDS3-UGPzO5eUol7kQxeOfWxPUeb0v5bOP6EIL1WZXAvTfT8vfxkjocImWMoLkpgQ5OMSKyfGrU2BgJnL__P4Ywf782FUJvH6U885-s4K7hlQO-ORA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_e=fDOpFcnV2k8qiBwQizzWtJ93WAOyGX8-TRgNqZMT_0sIfM_kEFWLObenAiUaniYr_32jHK0iJaJB4B1NSZVOMufL2D0gcAMED7I01PfeEq3pInv6bFqVBrge724PvZJpsy0aI865O7zpXOFUqtqYrAqwjQwJLBamrsWZbl3qd8Q23mqUbHpemoPal7DGfEf0eCi47vUJIdEMjmielkwYOWcdcTle77dKMIWtOSrBFia8Ay8bPnOip6HjsscGr1tcL1TBjjCbLiLkKWFvDU8AOx5IjkZAlVY9rat4ScAwoBp1nXKROghVi_vEbzCKf4a5ZJDFryfexNOcFgPkA9nXdQpO8r2tru-zU3UkjOan5OjM-PBf4mOCIMn8MX56euVTb9HluW5qg97qIKBxnvlRTw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Full Mag News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_t=i22h9Jwdxng8rnfd0Fc3tGB_7tHfCVGGVMIq_tvx3bv9FK2g4_85BGGE5k-HWCsyn5ZuxDag_xVK7q0um9WXL1G2zR6gI_UVhYN17J8H9g6S1S1E4GddJE5h8Qk1LYgdm2lvMfAEuCLWs9VJAPuR5QjqEKke1LV6DCRgUzoFDcM%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_e=VxEOsA6Xh7x-Km9iYP0iUpSKOGFRuekl5Bn0F_Gx6LzwITz_l9Bkjb7m_huz7QN58--mebcXDOybKYOeUeg8iW7Qpy903AkKNX86IuX-lp_hL_yOJpsGKRZOkY-4MJ28yQf6xriDrWopYgqLOkolqY5sQEr1lAFzI36FkZ-va4FaEbySVYqrZGFMUZoeqFc8Mcab8Mh1DWV_CMgQPN4ABbQYfLVwYf4YPMB2aszE27oWbkNuxkDmx1mVVoDtAlrNE7QYkSaMtR1qYH99KHDUBQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db781621886247a28b3e08032ad8c10b&_e=fDOpFcnV2k8qiBwQizzWtAkUtZOV0alE2F7_Eb2co3Yyx1_uk9pEn6L-8mzU8vGO3g5YOuNdwJ9fazAEiwAlEM10GPunHBcXouHI8CECzcGhMw1XIXJ979EitDKsPQiDwYu6N7khnMZ0BJqm6fsoQXK26jYKBK4Lsd4ah6LqqcXAZBGEt_vJ3M5TbrS0R4f149WfvxIeJdPLUuJhZfXaBeOZ8hck0RS_yJszl_jOvrM%3D)_

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The truth behind why this matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Ron DeSantis needs you to know why your support matters to this team. We're facing our most critical moment.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38523%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sJ9V9o4CE%2bQg70hPFIvKYQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Since the launch of our campaign, our fundraising team has stayed true to our commitment to treating you differently than other campaigns. When we reach out asking for help, it's because we're honest with you about needing support in critical moments. **Right now, we're facing THE most critical moment this campaign has faced yet.** The Iowa Caucuses are on January 15th, and we're asking for your help today. **_**_**_[**_Chip in $25 or more before midnight to help us hit our critical fundraising goal!_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38524%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N2EursFg9SQsILcVsnINcg&sysid=1)_**_**_**
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38535%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fBnoHie8gENyFAh11v8gRA&sysid=1)
---
| | [DONATE $47](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38536%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VGURtqUrB%2fVp699GEXokjg&sysid=1)
---
| | [DONATE $100](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38537%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QeHgjuUMJJo7H4y5ccbjfQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38538%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e1fO9g8owaWp%2fqMn1VixyA&sysid=1)
---
If you've seen any of our messages this week, you know that we have a grassroots fundraising goal of raising $37,000 every day until the Iowa Caucuses. **_This is what we need to close the gap,_**_**Friend**_** _._****_This is where we NEED you to step in._** If every grassroots donor on our team pitched in $20, we would finish this race with every resource we need to WIN in January at the Iowa Caucus, win at the New Hampshire primary, and go on to win for this country next November.
---
| | [Make a Difference. Chip in $20](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38539%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xPoskWv8ag6BmW5DZj7c3Q&sysid=1)
---
**_We have until January 15th. We cannot allow our support to dwindle when there is this much on the line._** In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38523%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sJ9V9o4CE%2bQg70hPFIvKYQ&sysid=1)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689823%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=As16klVWrzkg5ZGzRnopxg&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689824%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hVJINsEKY035Q6LAW3zvNg&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689835%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4%2fH%2biXf6sp7TwO%2fv%2fVWsow&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689836%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2lnd7JwZoIJd5iQf4xRmMg&sysid=1)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Will you become a 2024 founding donor to our campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT)
Hi Peter,
Now that we’re officially in 2024, the stakes of this race are more urgent than ever. My opponent, Mitch McConnell, and the national GOP are gearing up to spend hundreds of millions of dollars this year to flip Pennsylvania and take Senate control.
**I’m no stranger to a tough campaign, but I know this one will be different.** I also know how important building resources early can be for the strength of our campaign.
**So I talked to my team, and we set a goal to kick off the year.****We’re looking for 10,000 supporters to be the first donors we have in 2024 — all in one week.** 10,000 donations of any amount will help us start 2024 in a strong position to defend this Senate seat. Even $5 or $10 really adds up.
**[Will you be one of our founding donors of 2024 and help us reach our 10,000 donor goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240102-1&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240102-1-el&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240102-1-el&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240102-1-el&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240102-1-el&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240102-1-el&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240102-1&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT)
---
Hitting this goal is an important benchmark for our campaign. Let me explain why.
My mega-millionaire opponent could write himself a check and fund his entire campaign. Meanwhile, we’re working day in and day out to earn support and relying on folks like you to help us. I’ll never back down from fighting for the people of Pennsylvania in the Senate, and I’m hoping you can help keep me there.
**[Please, become a 2024 Founding Donor today. Help us hit our 10,000 donor goal this week by chipping in any amount to our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240102-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240102-1&refcode2=1570_552475_jZOtMT&akid=1570%2E552475%2EjZOtMT)**
I’m thankful to have you on our team.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: While national Republicans are gearing up to defeat me, I’m glad to have you on my side Peter,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Starting off 2024 right, thanks to your support! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76347367/447264077/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQzODdlMy05MWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49C2ZjpDrd7fXY3dEfklcSg4vj7aS9PFONvjrlMGFlU=&emci=a926fc25-21a0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=5dd387e3-91a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

I hope you had a safe and happy New Year!

I want to take a moment to share how grateful I am for this grassroots team. **On Sunday, we reached our crucial FEC end-of-year fundraising goal, and we couldn't have done it without your support.**

As we enter this election year, I know we are about to face another very tough race. My Republican opponent has already been gaining ground, consolidating support, and clearing the field in order to flip WA-08 red. The NRCC is already planning on spending millions in swing districts like this one.

But thanks to your support in the final days of 2023, we're in a stronger position to protect WA-08 and keep it blue. While national Republicans are gearing up for a fight, with this grassroots team by my side, I know we can protect this seat and retake the House majority.

So thank you once again, Peter, for your continued support. My campaign is stronger for it, and I look forward to seeing all that we will accomplish in this new year.

Thank you,

Kim
Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76347368/447264080/-660155977?refcode=em23_240102_EOYTY_engg_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_240102_EOYTY_engg_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5dd387e3-91a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQzODdlMy05MWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49C2ZjpDrd7fXY3dEfklcSg4vj7aS9PFONvjrlMGFlU=)**

Peter,
I want to start off the year by saying thank you. 2023 was a historic year for our state, and none of our work would have been possible without you and this grassroots team.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76347434/447264247/364466218?refcode=image&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgxZmUxMS05MmE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0g7NxI6uwVpiqFU7mGMlMLOnzfAre3FUtPQ_WHONKyA=)
_Happy New Year from Peggy, Tom, and Siobhan!_
We secured universal meals for our students, signed bold climate legislation leading Minnesota to 100% clean energy by 2040, became the first state to codify abortion rights into law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, and so much more.
Minnesota is strong, and we’re getting stronger every day — all while showing the rest of the country what it looks like to be a state that stands up to bullies and lifts everyone up.
2024 will be filled with new challenges and opportunities, but I know we will continue to rise to the occasion and do great things together as One Minnesota.
With hope for the new year,
Peggy Flanagan

Minnesota is strong, and we’re getting stronger every day — all while showing the rest of the country what it looks like to be a state that stands up to bullies and lifts everyone up. 2024 will be filled with new challenges and opportunities, but I know we will continue to rise to the occasion and do great things together as One Minnesota. With hope for the new year, Peggy Flanagan ********=******

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=960e76bbdf5b43c98062e0d21525956d&_e=Ww-HRxeruQyhnoFzExs1VhuCbbYV8pTuXfJg2qPrfE9XGlWs8F6NIA2WLryJL6LfAUO2OqXlzMLT6YYolW_4eO9cEdC6_cR00J_doZDBEEhYuqFWNGYsFuM8EQQpejQDx_CMaCXpYITSzPEhdKBgjdls6-U9Y89Z1k17GH-zEfbMEtahPzVkI_8tR384PeT-A257HvMan0X__FrRI7_Ozre81dXxkOxuEDkTY6b9i8E4BCB8vmLpURIWRy56tcHGjXeYxSizElB04YSnEsAIFL2zD_JUkJWFGfZCvIGtf5P1AvKM6xq8IHqmVr4WvvQXNvGZEWMUwUROdOsMfcFFMpOn-B-NTAu97LREd0kskOIhmUEbouXKBO5w18LhcZo8qaGUHWLFMA9oQnZGEyoNPOQWSR6B3JsbhKDrzyIFfAY%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=960e76bbdf5b43c98062e0d21525956d&_e=Ww-HRxeruQyhnoFzExs1VhuCbbYV8pTuXfJg2qPrfE9XGlWs8F6NIA2WLryJL6LfAUO2OqXlzMLT6YYolW_4eO9cEdC6_cR00J_doZDBEEhYuqFWNGYsFuM8EQQpejQDx_CMaCXpYITSzPEhdKBgjdls6-U9Y89Z1k17GH-zEfbMEtahPzVkI_8tR384PeT-A257HvMan0X__FrRI7_Ozre81dXxkOxuEDkTY6b9i8E4BCB8vmLpURIWRy56tcHGa0GU6LoT_Vxp3RMAeBRjV3gimfqqSiSyFeXYMzsbotA70P6l0IJgtoCQr8fyM42juJVbnMKeB7RX1q7lACp_dQOWQFpxSipFlxY9iWqw6E0ivNTN6ewqxDQH7itHl43QMZMr3KIQcbRoNkb5IcpfNyyJsFuC2oiu3b9hYLAZj4o%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=960e76bbdf5b43c98062e0d21525956d&_e=Ww-HRxeruQyhnoFzExs1VhuCbbYV8pTuXfJg2qPrfE9XGlWs8F6NIA2WLryJL6LfAUO2OqXlzMLT6YYolW_4eO9cEdC6_cR00J_doZDBEEhYuqFWNGYsFuM8EQQpejQDx_CMaCXpYITSzPEhdKBgjdls6-U9Y89Z1k17GH-zEfbMEtahPzVkI_8tR384PeT-A257HvMan0X__FrRI7_Ozre81dXxkOxuEDkTY6b9i8E4BCB8vmLpURIWRy56tcHGCZtAAbt0KbwSo0Sb35IGkrXA14L-wKJzxhwn4eq4zIxXVwZqjlqHDy7tZWeYy5awF0Sk7hNvvHgrWb0Du98MZpilVBKv_alK8VPJqG0u3u7RSLO3wj8iq2nRrBIbLyiH4kqGzT7b6MH0YrPI7_9FkcvOzOWfohItoXoSBW_jlxI%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The truth behind why this matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Ron DeSantis needs you to know why your support matters to this team. We're facing our most critical moment.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgjhb335apqb5ai3rcehuu2uce7u14m7s3bne0j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j6co70cdh2bs)

Friend, Since the launch of our campaign, our fundraising team has stayed true to our commitment to treating you differently than other campaigns. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z397i3mu49g2vumq3vbv67qednhenbif98ruue2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j6co70cdh2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

I grew up in an Ethiopian village with no running water.

Because I was a Jew living under an oppressive dictatorship- I was evacuated to Israel with the help of the United States.

At 18 years old I enlisted in the Israeli Defense Forces to defend the values & blessings of freedom from radical Islamic terrorists.

I went on to meet my husband & together we immigrated to America the right & legal way.

Today I'm a loving mother of 7 beautiful children & the GOP nominee in the NY-03 Special Election.

The Special Election was declared just days ago & I launched my campaign immediately- but the liberal Governor of New York didn't want to give us any time to build momentum & mount a serious challenge.

And now we have just weeks before voting begins.

But I've started from scratch before & I'm no stranger to being an underdog.

It is not secret- this race is going to be won or lost at the grassroots level.

And the support this email generates will quite literally decide whether we keep this seat red- or whether Joe Biden walks away with another win.

---

This seat went red in the 2022 midterms & with your help today, we will keep it that way!

Thank you!

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Candidate | NY-03 Special Election

| | Peter — We're facing a critical moment in the fight for reproductive freedom. The Supreme Court is deciding the fate of mifepristone — a crucial abortion medication. **More than**** _half_****of all abortions in this country depend on this drug.** If banned, it'll effectively block safe abortion options nationwide. The White House calls this an "extreme and dangerous abortion ban." **Despite being FDA-approved and safe, right-wing groups are relentlessly pushing to ban mifepristone, and it's finally made it's way onto the Supreme Court's docket.** The same Supreme Court that overturned _Roe._ [**Sign the petition and help make it abundantly clear that we won't stand by as our rights are eroded.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76349750/447267781/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-elect-lynn-peterson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-lynn-peterson%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTljZWY4ZC05NGE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzKqZBzNRS3Yfz6_pLIbusQ5g5DX6x_ZIazYPH2vj44=&emci=87c15306-0fa1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=9a9cef8d-94a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76349751/447267782/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-elect-lynn-peterson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-lynn-peterson%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTljZWY4ZC05NGE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzKqZBzNRS3Yfz6_pLIbusQ5g5DX6x_ZIazYPH2vj44=&emci=87c15306-0fa1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=9a9cef8d-94a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352) This issue is beyond politics — it's about our autonomy, our freedom, and our right to make our own informed health care decisions. | | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a3b5f219c69d4a71a9079a91684171fb&_e=UmTDRD1f154pqVmasPK6Rzey2ZJUrLH6JGoYHaB1OyIsLIk67mV2_XIB0HEbR7UlQC0hZvcluXNXdEqi3nQIBaVMik6bz4UoGwI4U4FPF72c0K-uGPU3wMgKuKnVMYddTMKipvohUjOSSUQONws_ovR2iiFsRfP3-UmpqXvmnm04WBivFUFlA6d9YtkfXgAi-zZQPNj8QCqNHxuEpmJoBoFHjvarDWkTfK8UZL-BZqZITTz-_aDerKVNioXwqxf8CaTx1gR5WJ5MyipVHe7gXh4SvEh2G_gc7Xxuuy-wOggy6HmXkRmTpUU5NeA0t__XdAQ2lRWLWoGHR1p3J_PxkzmsgJRmAqTFRbMqyhCxYkDSktWpk2IJidJQxtfNmO3WS4EH26ujZ60DmpORnDaQvQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a3b5f219c69d4a71a9079a91684171fb&_e=UmTDRD1f154pqVmasPK6Rzey2ZJUrLH6JGoYHaB1OyIsLIk67mV2_XIB0HEbR7UlQC0hZvcluXNXdEqi3nQIBaVMik6bz4UoGwI4U4FPF72c0K-uGPU3wMgKuKnVMYddTMKipvohUjOSSUQONws_ovR2iiFsRfP3-UmpqXvmnm04WBivFUFlA6d9YtkfXgAi-zZQPNj8QCqNHxuEpmJoBoFHjvarDWkTfK8UZL-BZqbXIbKIVDGMaaGH92pS9At2_O8HxNSXXPfiLA1xrA0mfxRnu92wyi2nbyx4-x3oIWnu2dSbSg6A0-9fe-MjzIObSZ3Jc3yDnJ-eCnF2SofIiFvR97FDyJ3YBSCmLR1ekPbCazGv6qrxk9pWhIGKTYUynEVn0MBwTReypcMutdLQQw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a3b5f219c69d4a71a9079a91684171fb&_e=UmTDRD1f154pqVmasPK6Rzey2ZJUrLH6JGoYHaB1OyIsLIk67mV2_XIB0HEbR7UlQC0hZvcluXNXdEqi3nQIBaVMik6bz4UoGwI4U4FPF72c0K-uGPU3wMgKuKnVMYddTMKipvohUjOSSUQONws_ovR2iiFsRfP3-UmpqXvmnm04WBivFUFlA6d9YtkfXgAi-zZQPNj8QCqNHxuEpmJoBoFHjvarDWkTfK8UZL-BZqatIMsTJ9IiULJR29KfiKD4ktF_Of9I_QrmY88YwzYpgAto7XjCDJG6vPcTn3S-qL97KM98iuszjmgPidICe8mdBgILqbWGrJDv3CfOmxgp2wj8QsrVtpXBmsxRw1dlMjvFX-4tWZLl-EKy-Bk6t9-dOEy_Owr3i5kkgj9GQS_sbg%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a3b5f219c69d4a71a9079a91684171fb&_e=UmTDRD1f154pqVmasPK6Rzey2ZJUrLH6JGoYHaB1OyIsLIk67mV2_XIB0HEbR7UlQC0hZvcluXNXdEqi3nQIBaVMik6bz4UoGwI4U4FPF72c0K-uGPU3wMgKuKnVMYddTMKipvohUjOSSUQONws_ovR2iiFsRfP3-UmpqXvmnm04WBivFUFlA6d9YtkfXgAi-zZQPNj8QCqNHxuEpmJoBoFHjvarDWkTfK8UZL-BZqaTHU2ujrcQtcIwgxaXjIJCUfqIIIBVgBT45chyyw9gQvmT5Iu7zTTQmTaiwWFxNSpWDjNr6gQhPYp1KWZDPc_31HOkI7fSRQk1srrm5zz3fCmL6_dqQcxC3c6fWfzVWCFiaD-D8tz6qoYScKMcNRV40jHl5z0nPbWLNtTZjhluzA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
