clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sTjZJoO7ex5bzWPWpEd_xw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sTjZJoO7ex5bzWPWpEd_xw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sTjZJoO7ex5bzWPWpEd_xw~~/AARclAA~~)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CN88tSKO1TXw_LQQCFu2jQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRndvNqP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWDA0mUZbArZy5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KBL_U9TCP20PLLAhgDBZlQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRndvNqP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplgwNJlGWwK2cuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

body:

# [Sign your name: Demand Clarence Thomas recuse himself from Trump 2024 ballot cases >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T349e7492-7459-45b7-8421-5306b806b300/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Justice Clarence Thomas' wife, Ginni Thomas, had direct involvement in the events of Jan 6, 2021 and played a part in spreading the Big Lie. She exchanged text messages with Trump's Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in the weeks following the 2020 election, urging him to keep fighting to overturn the election results. This calls into question Clarence Thomas' ability to be an impartial judge in cases related to Trump and his attempts to overthrow the 2020 election. With cases heading to the Supreme Court dealing with states removing Trump from their 2024 ballots, Thomas should recuse himself from potential rulings. That's what Democratic Rep. Jamie Raskin is calling for, and we couldn't agree more. We can't trust that Clarence Thomas will rule impartially re: Trump's placement on the ballot when his wife was directly involved in Trump's effort to overturn the 2020 election. [**Add your name now: Demand Clarence Thomas recuse himself from Trump 2024 ballot cases >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7724be2-6a53-45c4-bd42-4a2de2c259a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peace through Strength |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7ae9e7d5ea&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Last Sunday, our son Will was called to active duty for an extended military deployment to the Horn of Africa. Along with hundreds of other soldiers from the Pennsylvania Army National Guard, Sergeant Dellicker will be defending American interests in this tumultuous region of the world.

Meanwhile, U.S. forces overseas keep getting attacked. Since Hamas raided Israel, terrorists have targeted U.S. troops in the region more than 100 times, injuring at least three American soldiers.

I want to go to Congress to restore America’s military deterrence. President Ronald Reagan called it “Peace through Strength.” It’s the only thing that can defend us against terrorists, communists, dictators, and thugs, and it’s the best way to keep us out of needless foreign wars.

In fact, I have a simple test for American military involvement. Is it worth sending my own son into harm’s way? If the answer is no, then I won’t vote to send your sons or daughters either.

I’ve served my country 28 years as an infantryman, intelligence officer, and squadron commander. I’ve deployed to the combat zone four different times. I’m a graduate of Air War College with a master’s degree in military operations.

I don’t seek your support because I’m a veteran. I seek your support because in Washington, I’ll be one of the most experienced Members of Congress in military affairs and national security. I’ll lead the charge to rebuild our military, reform our intelligence agencies, counter China, and secure the border.

No other candidate for PA-07 has any military experience to counter the threats we face. This election isn’t a popularity contest. I’m not running for student council. I’m running to keep us out of war.

Will's obligation to the Army ended last October, but he decided to extend his enlistment through the deployment because he didn’t want to leave his fellow soldiers behind.

We owe it to Will, and all his brothers and sisters in arms, to give them what they need to fight and win our nation’s wars. We must never put them in harm’s way without a clear and achievable mission. And we must always bring them home quickly when the job is done.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d7c7979fcf&e=1090c5c412)._
---
| |
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!

clean_body: Peace through Strength | | | | | Dear Friends and Neighbors, Last Sunday, our son Will was called to active duty for an extended military deployment to the Horn of Africa. Along with hundreds of other soldiers from the Pennsylvania Army National Guard, Sergeant Dellicker will be defending American interests in this tumultuous region of the world. Meanwhile, U.S. forces overseas keep getting attacked. Since Hamas raided Israel, terrorists have targeted U.S. troops in the region more than 100 times, injuring at least three American soldiers. I want to go to Congress to restore America’s military deterrence. President Ronald Reagan called it “Peace through Strength.” It’s the only thing that can defend us against terrorists, communists, dictators, and thugs, and it’s the best way to keep us out of needless foreign wars. In fact, I have a simple test for American military involvement. Is it worth sending my own son into harm’s way? If the answer is no, then I won’t vote to send your sons or daughters either. I’ve served my country 28 years as an infantryman, intelligence officer, and squadron commander. I’ve deployed to the combat zone four different times. I’m a graduate of Air War College with a master’s degree in military operations. I don’t seek your support because I’m a veteran. I seek your support because in Washington, I’ll be one of the most experienced Members of Congress in military affairs and national security. I’ll lead the charge to rebuild our military, reform our intelligence agencies, counter China, and secure the border. No other candidate for PA-07 has any military experience to counter the threats we face. This election isn’t a popularity contest. I’m not running for student council. I’m running to keep us out of war. Will's obligation to the Army ended last October, but he decided to extend his enlistment through the deployment because he didn’t want to leave his fellow soldiers behind. We owe it to Will, and all his brothers and sisters in arms, to give them what they need to fight and win our nation’s wars. We must never put them in harm’s way without a clear and achievable mission. And we must always bring them home quickly when the job is done. Keep America Free. Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. In other parts of the world, it sounds like a fantasy, but that’s my story here in the United States. I love this country. I fought to defend it in the Navy. And now, I’m fighting to defend it in the U.S. Senate. I don’t know about you, but I’m ready to win in 2024. so we can take this race to victory, take back the Senate, and take back our country. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. If you’re on board for our fight for Virginia, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hung Cao for VirginiaPO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5b8fbebe08f4c928872db5c3c453c48&_e=DR3y5xYJIiA18RWnPbxivd7drfCwPBXG16BE__rwFl_HQHe_6xE8-ww-gBL_SEdgNnDIAtjC86kESP3G9tIbS1QPOdzu4Gy-_a7h8gU_cPdUHBVn4NzRQXqGZG6gnyVTbsS3jbh4btOR8Id-SK8qAbmxQAAUlk9ACI8r97lL1NqMZtJ6P_7R5mWq6waKGyP0vzajYAI_SAO760UEpB3y3TyhAKW3zanVPOMcCNKuOyovZfs17Ddoogb8ESc3q2IUs9okvRu_-Pi9t1aSL0FccgBZeSbQoegnXrNF23TJwPOybf6NMzlMU5IPhaZJjbHpDiwbTrKem1i6xxGZKX6KnKaJWGJV1mizPNzceGdxyHX3z5LmrJCun4yrXPt3-Y7tZRWsU732ka4-oBEyBXjUlJ39GyeufPyMyUPTSKzWSLo%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5b8fbebe08f4c928872db5c3c453c48&_e=DR3y5xYJIiA18RWnPbxivd7drfCwPBXG16BE__rwFl_HQHe_6xE8-ww-gBL_SEdgNnDIAtjC86kESP3G9tIbS1QPOdzu4Gy-_a7h8gU_cPdUHBVn4NzRQXqGZG6gnyVTbsS3jbh4btOR8Id-SK8qAbmxQAAUlk9ACI8r97lL1NqMZtJ6P_7R5mWq6waKGyP0vzajYAI_SAO760UEpB3y3TyhAKW3zanVPOMcCNKuOyovZfs17Ddoogb8ESc3q2IUwdvPhOwvwuoBRJ7iLL-PHa5sNv9qdB0M11IW-gnBX1OnyShyCT8ml4v3OOYZCq8ZN3dcXCrOpgE0tqUU-i0OwDmEC0-WJAu7fw3jsIprjvsarztFwUaiaARGkNXGdQ1xN6OJ3hThA91iKM_0ZGALGWx1cVtQZfpPRbhmVj2e1f4%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5b8fbebe08f4c928872db5c3c453c48&_e=DR3y5xYJIiA18RWnPbxivd7drfCwPBXG16BE__rwFl_HQHe_6xE8-ww-gBL_SEdgNnDIAtjC86kESP3G9tIbS1QPOdzu4Gy-_a7h8gU_cPdUHBVn4NzRQXqGZG6gnyVTbsS3jbh4btOR8Id-SK8qAbmxQAAUlk9ACI8r97lL1NqMZtJ6P_7R5mWq6waKGyP0vzajYAI_SAO760UEpB3y3TyhAKW3zanVPOMcCNKuOyovZfs17Ddoogb8ESc3q2IUzluTfubhTjH7-hvUWtkIyJ370PAjYzmILM21nHSVZlPNnM7ni-o89SJy8f1G1ScvPlDPOVyV6Q-9PYrBnChJOlmY-Z-1ScE4Jwgy5DsnPSMIbJ9PHVNI3nAj0m3TR0SrkgJEJLbWAb_gXJtfkL-BRPL9jabi0HTcUOz20JVHf0Q%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: How we're going to Chase the Vote

body:
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebikcl7hh6cgh8lt30r7fc6gplqb1cqd410pvr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)

| | Friend,
---
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvchudfi7cv67e8kabqs1rgbhj2ptf187d7srrg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)
---
**[Friend, can I count on YOUR gift right now to help support this MASSIVE and GAME-CHANGING ballot-chasing initiative?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsuaj2233frpem59sbbubim6nnscmuntg564v4co_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)** For every dollar you donate, you'll help Turning Point Action put MORE boots on the ground, knock on MORE doors, and turn out MORE voters in the must-win precincts and states in the 2024 Election.
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqofb77sd5m759n4vjts0nktfl8bl662mad9oo28_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)
---
For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the ballot game. As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots from Conservative voters were cast and delivered. That's why, despite conservative majorities in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we didn't secure the victories we needed. But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. [**Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on grassroots patriots like YOU for support.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhauqku3d0tkplu952k637ar165ui39fjk9n22so_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0son3e1hgc5a5avkmdi24srljm628sbkibijjk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)
---
| | Imagine the impact of: • THOUSANDS of patriotic voters reached and registered, • HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS of voters getting to their polling locations or casting their ballots by mail, and • getting out the vote to WIN BIG for True Conservative Principles in Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and beyond in 2024. **[Friend, your support can be the DECIDING FACTOR in how many voters that Turning Point Action is able to reach, register, and TURN OUT to vote in 2024 -- please, make your gift right now to help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqvs80k5mt01p0jd2arlhp4lvgvmjme41vv9vvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9j62or6c3h2bs)** Thank you for standing with me and Turning Point Action. I hope you're proud of the work you're already accomplishing to help SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left, and I can't wait to see how much more we're able to do for America's future in the year to come.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder Turning Point Action

clean_body: We can’t lose momentum now! | Hi there, I need to make a sincere request for support as 2024 begins. = Every day that passes brings us one step closer to our goal of defeating Marsha Blackburn and returning this Senate seat to the people of Tennessee. Every day that passes also means there’s less time to connect with voters and overcome Marsha’s advantages as an incumbent and her piles of corporate PAC donations. We need all the chips to fall into place if we’re going to win this critical election. We can’t control everything — but we have to do everything possible to set this campaign up for success. That starts by meeting our campaign’s fundraising goals. I was so grateful that your support in December helped us end the year strong (and meet our goals!). We can’t lose momentum now! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

| |

| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7a748ba10ba4e36a5e926f619e0c377&_e=awfBovy8asJhSEo9Rps481bo2-ZiNj8n400GULiqV0dGoJG0478W1PZb2s547YK9FOnNuW0q0CGENQPDod4ZsZ5a9EVDPPsJcqJbVcmpzf5znf0-IVF0ZDYZ8uF4Ozdth-Cpiow72hqfQ22qp7h9UNzzSYkmQu_Dliw23H-dlxizselcVbnTf0iQ9EuAxmznGGfyiz-CtDc0NvFRvfA9W8Epf5HFv8LpPfr7erCZ5qviMKN6trt5En5l6rhv9ryO8YbHpSXxLylQk03TxOsk02Lmd2Uu5VjlvxnTQ9JyVAE8DWyhNY28oeWuwnvphEZqPEBFtLoeO5QLDPUDmEfF6GlyG6GZi8EPOvEIdIa0iwCax-HeRmn2oABxOTxLd71C5yj_w_01-v51nb8nU-Rmczc40SvHqzjRbKQ9ceEuPEYgoYMsqiUy1v1MS8N8mfbDwCHQuUv_3L5NWWBLl4zy1dsArmyikjnPr4ejJ6iJMLk%3D)

I grew up in an Ethiopian village with no running water.

Because I was a Jew living under an oppressive dictatorship- I was evacuated to Israel with the help of the United States.

At 18 years old I enlisted in the Israeli Defense Forces to defend the values & blessings of freedom from radical Islamic terrorists.

I went on to meet my husband & together we immigrated to America the right & legal way.

Today I'm a loving mother of 7 beautiful children & the GOP nominee in the NY-03 Special Election.

The Special Election was declared just days ago & I launched my campaign immediately- but the liberal Governor of New York didn't want to give us any time to build momentum & mount a serious challenge.

And now we have just weeks before voting begins.

But I've started from scratch before & I'm no stranger to being an underdog.

It is not secret- this race is going to be won or lost at the grassroots level.

And the support this email generates will quite literally decide whether we keep this seat red- or whether Joe Biden walks away with another win.

---

This seat went red in the 2022 midterms & with your help today, we will keep it that way!

Thank you!

The last thing our commonwealth needs is another MAGA extremist in Harrisburg who cares more about toeing the far-right party line than standing up for everyday Pennsylvanians.

That’s why I’m fighting so hard to win this race and bring integrity, experience, and results to Harrisburg— _but I can’t win this battleground race by myself._

[**Please, will you rush a donation of any amount to help us reach our goal and power this campaign through 2024? body:
I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, friend
| | |
---
Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: _I just pulled the numbers, and we fell $1,768 short of our end-of-quarter goal._
Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign – donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority.
So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,768 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. **Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? Kirsten is counting on you to dig deep tonight so that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and compete with the GOP's megadonors.**
**Here's your personal donation link:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76353133/447274812/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzhjMmU3MS05OWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxUzNnnGtJ6Kp6y_bDzzTf7aOa7sm52SIeuWRZH7ji4=)**

Stefanie

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76353135/447274814/1575385346?refcode=jtk4695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzhjMmU3MS05OWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxUzNnnGtJ6Kp6y_bDzzTf7aOa7sm52SIeuWRZH7ji4=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76353136/447274815/1575385346?refcode=jtk4695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzhjMmU3MS05OWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxUzNnnGtJ6Kp6y_bDzzTf7aOa7sm52SIeuWRZH7ji4=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: the ONE food Jesus said to NEVER eat
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

The Bible says that
to eat fish without fins or scales is 'detestable'…

Which many think is
because they're known to carry bacterial, parasitic, and viral
diseases.

Like shrimp…
who eat any and everything they can find.

Including dead animal
remains…

And even cannibalize
each other for survival!

But one thing is
clear…

Omega 3s found in sea
life are an ESSENTIAL mineral for humans…

Especially for
healing inflammation in the body.

So… what fish
can we consume instead?

Well, there is ONE
specific type of sea life that feeds on the most superior source
of Omega 3…

That's 8X MORE
powerful than any other fish… and 'Bible approved'.

My clients who add
this ONE sealife nutrient to their diet ease inflammation in as
little as 24 hours!

Like Chelsea O. from Bremerton
who says "...I noticed a difference within 24 hours! Even my
medical care providers noticed a difference in my movement and
the lessened head in the areas where I'm usually inflamed. This
stuff works MIRACLES."

name: Gabe Amo
subject: President Biden Needs Your Help
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Dear Friend,

As our country enters election year 2024, we have an important mission: we need to re-elect President Joe Biden to preserve our democracy and continue investing in America.

Here in Rhode Island, President Biden needs your help to collect 1,000 signatures to get on the Rhode Island Primary Ballot on April 2, 2024. Our goal is to get him on the ballot by January 8th.

We need all hands on deck to get President Biden on the ballot in Rhode Island!

Anyone can help by:
- Gathering signatures
- Hosting a signature gathering event
- Attending signature party

Sign up here to help! [https://actionnetwork.org/event_campaigns/biden-for-president-ballot-access-in-rhode-island]

The stakes are high and we have made our state stronger under President Biden — I saw this first hand when I worked at the White House.

Due to the work of the Biden Administration, Rhode Island has:
- Added almost 35,000 jobs and lowered the unemployment rate by 3.1 points
- Received $1.2 billion to build our infrastructure
- Announced it is the nation's first Ocean Tech Hub
- Received $3.5 million to advance community-driven environmental justice initiatives
- Expanded access to free school meals to an additional 23,000 students
- Committed over $700 million in private sector investments
- Expanded access to affordable high-speed internet to over 55,000 households
- Lowered costs of health care premiums and prescription drugs for over 200,000 residents with Medicare

I look forward to working together to get President Biden back on the ballot in Rhode Island and re-elected in November!

With gratitude,
Gabe Amo

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gabe-amo-for-congress-2] VOLUNTEER [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/564657/] GET UPDATES [https://www.gabeamo.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo] https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XWtddIVotU--0Apd99NvFQ2?unsubscribedata=dnXdo6mLxuppFkPf71X2vryk%2FjsLubpMOimA%2B7VaFDddE3DFg4B4O%2Foh%2B9eR4k%2BIVWm412zsUfEADYqiObaLQ0%2BUD5QjrUMLSJBVZ%2FhSsf6rbirlii3QqfP8VNTIs9uS8WPaYORga5tjF7zAQY76ayFUTLljWVqMwh9UkeCsU1i6BrpsZqB%2FTcHV%2BvJLODoBvHRYkpcNobVYVdFHPcWrFOJxMHtTfH6CzAaKDvb1AwPnbTKEOWMaWhX58vT22vdM97GlYWGG5kD80NFid3NzmaBDknWmA9qO3J1qiaO72PGh8pJqnJbduUIPyIIA4GQ3yhXE2jLda1mps9VL2el9%2BAzLW9JJ1uevTRBaWrqauAcFRxk3YitBXY7lXFxVfsGUAcYB52KjiMzN%2Bl1DtOOzfH2s9f8r72KMTx873dYsfNds9WmAUaLCwySUhVR3V5um .

We need all hands on deck to get President Biden on the ballot in Rhode Island! Anyone can help by: - Gathering signatures - Hosting a signature gathering event - Attending signature party Sign up here to help! [] The stakes are high and we have made our state stronger under President Biden — I saw this first hand when I worked at the White House. Due to the work of the Biden Administration, Rhode Island has: - Added almost 35,000 jobs and lowered the unemployment rate by 3.1 points - Received $1.2 billion to build our infrastructure - Announced it is the nation's first Ocean Tech Hub - Received $3.5 million to advance community-driven environmental justice initiatives - Expanded access to free school meals to an additional 23,000 students - Committed over $700 million in private sector investments - Expanded access to affordable high-speed internet to over 55,000 households - Lowered costs of health care premiums and prescription drugs for over 200,000 residents with Medicare I look forward to working together to get President Biden back on the ballot in Rhode Island and re-elected in November! With gratitude, Gabe Amo DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] GET UPDATES [] [] [] [] [] Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
The White House is calling this an “extreme and dangerous abortion ban.”
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76354041/447277018/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTNmMjczZi05YmE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0n_tz-CyRrqFFlMhw8OQxHLVMmlyhHF0mf8p_ldOk0=&emci=b34efb55-2ea0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=f53f273f-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | The Supreme Court announced that they will make another major ruling on abortion rights, one that puts access to care in significant jeopardy across the country. **This year, the Supreme Court will decide whether doctors will be allowed to distribute mifepristone, a safe, effective drug used for medication abortions.** More than half of the abortions in the United States are done using mifepristone — and banning the drug would effectively outlaw _all_ medication abortions making it even more challenging to get safe care. I will always work to make health care access easier and more affordable for you, and that includes critical reproductive health care like abortions. [**Will you sign this petition and send a message to the Supreme Court that mifepristone is a safe and essential treatment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76354042/447277019/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-larsen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-rick-larsen%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTNmMjczZi05YmE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0n_tz-CyRrqFFlMhw8OQxHLVMmlyhHF0mf8p_ldOk0=&emci=b34efb55-2ea0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=f53f273f-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239) [add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76354043/447277020/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-larsen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-rick-larsen%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTNmMjczZi05YmE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0n_tz-CyRrqFFlMhw8OQxHLVMmlyhHF0mf8p_ldOk0=&emci=b34efb55-2ea0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=f53f273f-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239) Together we can make it clear: **These attacks affect every one of us and we will not let them go unchecked.** _Rick_ |

* * *
Friend, the stakes couldn’t be higher this critical election year.

Our planet is in crisis, and our current leaders are falling short. The time for change is now, and that change begins with us at the ballot box.

**But the battle for meaningful action on the climate crisis starts long before the November elections.** In the coming months, critical primary elections will determine our options for November — and we have to make sure voters nominate the strongest possible voice for climate action.

We need candidates at every level of government who will rise to the urgency of this moment and stand up to the greedy fossil fuel industry.

And the strength of this grassroots movement lies with the PEOPLE.

With your support, we will make sure politicians who cozy up to the fossil fuel industry _feel the heat_ as much as we do.

**That's why we're reaching out to our top supporters — _[urging you to kick off the new year by joining Jane Fonda in taking this pledge to vote for climate champions up and down the ballot in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76354125/447277355/2128711408?refcode=ea.f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ZmVhMjgyLTliYTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6db_MJLTcRu91SEeqPeyJTHzoG_MCMSMdXLxw-BVvWo=&emci=c67d597f-92a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**

So, are you ready to be a driving force for change?
| [TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76354126/447277356/2128711408?refcode=ea.f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ZmVhMjgyLTliYTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6db_MJLTcRu91SEeqPeyJTHzoG_MCMSMdXLxw-BVvWo=&emci=c67d597f-92a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7fea282-9ba9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team

clean_body: Trust us. It’s worth the read. | = | | Friend, the stakes couldn’t be higher this critical election year. Our planet is in crisis, and our current leaders are falling short. The time for change is now, and that change begins with us at the ballot box. But the battle for meaningful action on the climate crisis starts long before the November elections. In the coming months, critical primary elections will determine our options for November — and we have to make sure voters nominate the strongest possible voice for climate action. We need candidates at every level of government who will rise to the urgency of this moment and stand up to the greedy fossil fuel industry. And the strength of this grassroots movement lies with the PEOPLE. With your support, we will make sure politicians who cozy up to the fossil fuel industry feel the heat as much as we do. That's why we're reaching out to our top supporters — So, are you ready to be a driving force for change? | In solidarity, The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter, I’ll keep this quick.
Thank you so much for all your support in 2023. Because of you, we hit our end-of-quarter goal and are going into 2024 strong.
I know you heard from me and my team a lot towards the end of December — but it was for a good reason.
My resolution for the New Year is to flip Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District blue with you by my side. We needed to finish 2023 on a high note to get that done. And we did!
Thank you so, so much, Peter.
Let’s fight for change in 2024 and beyond.
Kirsten

name: Steve Scalise
subject: It’s official. I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just went on record - I endorsed Donald J. Trump for president.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**I have a big announcement - I am OFFICIALLY endorsing Donald J. Trump for president.**

He's the right man for the job. No one else can stick it to the Liberal Media like he can... No one else can unite our Party... And no one but my friend, President Trump, has the grit and determination to take down the Democrat Machine once and for all...

**[That's why he has my FULL SUPPORT. And now that I've proudly endorsed him, I'd like to let you in on our plan to save our country.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=55afcd3cc3eb48cc8f2acc71b0f0e054&_e=-c8frQtyXPAlCTmXjctzcKvB0bmGRA5-Nsst3ykg84aeQLknfzaWNZwPZRFOg16dv3PCuUuTWt2kFaZCwZjdGWYVTs8_T78krE85xkYvshKjSUF3o8L1UQvtjFUdk6BUcNDtYoLj1ZEwd9K5rZJ4-dJgftwSeFErt22kPknFu4VijStkKZmkeirUgGRfqk3TNJbXlCiEboKEWt1wv--R7ynFMw_dl97-XmljCi5HHMexSj-iWa9seDKH-Js44Wqbyx0jq7lLxZyIbI4VdfguPCWo_PCUDk37RKXLVw4z8lbvwp_PtTo1bHaRi8giGT7W5eG1VKwMa8DI0Ox-gpv76B-l_J0VIlY-4tyAiluKkCU-DC-uXp9GdlOWxXbv6xCWCZ6uEG7XEc0hVfr3dlhJgVXrGDrZqtzm06p2hQq7hZK7wxgVRZNYB3I_8pZgKHBAsGoUwLWfQzbWuixLf4frVw%3D%3D "That’s why he has my FULL SUPPORT. And now that I’ve proudly endorsed him, I’d like to let you in on our plan to save our country.")**

I am 100% sure President Trump can win back the White House. When he does, he'll need a Conservative House Majority working alongside him or the Democrats will use their power to obstruct, investigate, block, defund, or impeach - ANYTHING to stop President Trump from Making America Great Again.

_That 's never going to happen - not if I have anything to say about it!_

I am putting together a team of Pro-Trump American heroes to start 2024 off with a BANG. I am asking at least 15,000 Patriots to pitch in a few bucks before midnight and help make this our biggest fundraising day since Trump was in the White House. **[Together, we'll make history and hand a HUMILIATING defeat to Joe Biden and the Democrat Machine.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=55afcd3cc3eb48cc8f2acc71b0f0e054&_e=-c8frQtyXPAlCTmXjctzcKvB0bmGRA5-Nsst3ykg84aeQLknfzaWNZwPZRFOg16dv3PCuUuTWt2kFaZCwZjdGWYVTs8_T78krE85xkYvshKjSUF3o8L1UQvtjFUdk6BUcNDtYoLj1ZEwd9K5rZJ4-dJgftwSeFErt22kPknFu4VijStkKZmkeirUgGRfqk3TNJbXlCiEboKEWt1wv--R7ynFMw_dl97-XmljCi5HHMexSj-iWa9seDKH-Js44Wqbyx0jq7lLxZyIbI4VdfguPCWo_PCUDk37RKXLVw4z8lakfn-rdrQ2AnZpra8XlKGTfc5yaNqW52WsWhvm7oF_vcsZa4pi4sU3ZUPTN4XjoFdEWOsePm2GB2uOXhkeI23ebmUh_UepAFWYE1VkZWWnopTnE8zW1UENUxQtuOt7Fl-N0-42UX-bR0DR_tSFzKYW1lUbsyGOiRdg2mf8pITpOQ%3D%3D "Together, we’ll make history and hand a HUMILIATING defeat to Joe Biden and the Democrat Machine.")**

clean_body: I just went on record - I endorsed Donald J. Trump for president. | | | | | My fellow Americans: I have a big announcement - I am OFFICIALLY endorsing Donald J. Trump for president. He's the right man for the job. No one else can stick it to the Liberal Media like he can... No one else can unite our Party... And no one but my friend, President Trump, has the grit and determination to take down the Democrat Machine once and for all... "That’s why he has my FULL SUPPORT. And now that I’ve proudly endorsed him, I’d like to let you in on our plan to save our country." I am 100% sure President Trump can win back the White House. When he does, he'll need a Conservative House Majority working alongside him or the Democrats will use their power to obstruct, investigate, block, defund, or impeach - ANYTHING to stop President Trump from Making America Great Again. That 's never going to happen - not if I have anything to say about it! I am putting together a team of Pro-Trump American heroes to start 2024 off with a BANG. I am asking at least 15,000 Patriots to pitch in a few bucks before midnight and help make this our biggest fundraising day since Trump was in the White House. "Together, we’ll make history and hand a HUMILIATING defeat to Joe Biden and the Democrat Machine." BREAKING NEWS: STEVE SCALISE ENDORSES DONALD J. TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT | | | | "MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US >>" Look, We are officially less than a year out from the most important election of our lifetimes. It may seem like that's a long way off but I assure you, this is the point of the year when elections are won and lost. Here 's what we're up against: - The Democrat Machine already outraised us by $40,000,000+ - They've spent a QUARTER BILLION DOLLARS against us - Joe Biden is plastering the airwaves with negative ads If there was ever a moment for the Republican Party to come together and fight back... IT IS RIGHT NOW!!! "I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump. He needs us to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and work together to win back the White House. With your help, we’ll shatter our fundraising goal and make history." The deadline is midnight. Are you with us? | | | "MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: STAND WITH US >>" Thanks for all you do. Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" I'm launching my brand new "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me. This is very important to me. | | | "TAKE THE SURVEY >>" Thank you, Majority Leader Steve Scalise | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10316e7927ff4621bcfa65a1f50c868c&_e=GDdx4kUJkaVMDEH8fO8PBlIPbEKWenfEYRAerdgptgaEXSv1sXVv9OyEA3C0xLc0OiqMRk2ZoluRR2p-gTH0peUsG4HbizcG7JGvmpjXvjDe1yjDqfYyovNk-wOacgQT3qO6spe0N50pa04-GIPHc1065ESy8-3SSmCKWnRD8oXNWKlpxYRSotvzNuYswy-sM9Z3WdBxU6kFRR-gYe2LlCJFhrXyqN-H-2-8p5aIRWfT294JDxU_C3VEG3klx4vIcCaV-W1YCNd8KtGwm21MVkSNYDu3pO2OftZHF_VwIbUr0OIpwvvtXhPZxQWP3I2qeQxhBHXE6PM9c9qRLQQZq6UCcH_tVdlk86B1WrLT05HPSPrdYYhY975bUFYBTLmN)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10316e7927ff4621bcfa65a1f50c868c&_e=GDdx4kUJkaVMDEH8fO8PBlIPbEKWenfEYRAerdgptgaEXSv1sXVv9OyEA3C0xLc0OiqMRk2ZoluRR2p-gTH0peUsG4HbizcG7JGvmpjXvjDe1yjDqfYyovNk-wOacgQT3qO6spe0N50pa04-GIPHc1065ESy8-3SSmCKWnRD8oXNWKlpxYRSotvzNuYswy-sM9Z3WdBxU6kFRR-gYe2LlCJFhrXyqN-H-2-8p5aIRWehTX6HcQu2h5T_RisTKEHxVgA-adpKHE5Rm08CynsltXa8yWJVabGvdb4DSmYYvHtxHEXvqhHjcSDptY0Zcn-JAQLmpOpt6_jor1NEOOWO0X56p7pjPosS_oBdG9A47TJMdb353IFWIcPPShZI-4-o)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10316e7927ff4621bcfa65a1f50c868c&_e=GDdx4kUJkaVMDEH8fO8PBlIPbEKWenfEYRAerdgptgaEXSv1sXVv9OyEA3C0xLc0OiqMRk2ZoluRR2p-gTH0peUsG4HbizcG7JGvmpjXvjDe1yjDqfYyovNk-wOacgQT3qO6spe0N50pa04-GIPHc1065ESy8-3SSmCKWnRD8oXNWKlpxYRSotvzNuYswy-sM9Z3WdBxU6kFRR-gYe2LlCJFhrXyqN-H-2-8p5aIRWcwTK9CxjBePjVd1Hgult3pBFw_pNFPwOobbYIYZQwO9xrQSC0bbpkyAb2G7JnRfarMgjEG7Ogx8cdrN0DhxsDM1oNWnGpC3SyLBTfnoxkAdso0rj8wrVzrAqPaUTG_IIbNeeNqE7z5LTfAddNiIYu7)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10316e7927ff4621bcfa65a1f50c868c&_e=GDdx4kUJkaVMDEH8fO8PBlIPbEKWenfEYRAerdgptgaEXSv1sXVv9OyEA3C0xLc0OiqMRk2ZoluRR2p-gTH0peUsG4HbizcG7JGvmpjXvjDe1yjDqfYyovNk-wOacgQT3qO6spe0N50pa04-GIPHc1065ESy8-3SSmCKWnRD8oXNWKlpxYRSotvzNuYswy-sM9Z3WdBxU6kFRR-gYe2LlCJFhrXyqN-H-2-8p5aIRWcUx8aSSUyqU-yYcnaM6WAQEcKBnI7qm5tfWHuXejNTwd9SMsCGk0CryItxx2GcsFIKeUN5Bq-88b1Ij4cSXwSV5WNmz1y0Kpv4lwMpuFIBD1_km_oyyuIgcLf3Ssu5VefHAZih6fJ8wNVMGdWaU8U0)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10316e7927ff4621bcfa65a1f50c868c&_e=GDdx4kUJkaVMDEH8fO8PBlIPbEKWenfEYRAerdgptgaEXSv1sXVv9OyEA3C0xLc0OiqMRk2ZoluRR2p-gTH0peUsG4HbizcG7JGvmpjXvjDe1yjDqfYyovNk-wOacgQT3qO6spe0N50pa04-GIPHc1065ESy8-3SSmCKWnRD8oXNWKlpxYRSotvzNuYswy-sM9Z3WdBxU6kFRR-gYe2LlCJFhrXyqN-H-2-8p5aIRWfIUL9wd5hxJ-gIox2KC2VLWI-7pcpEg4fTF-YIN8xjur1Ey4XbiAUz_hepWgMnYWjAwmmA_pMr6NT-1dq6sofPkyQyhchchJZ6L817MvoBw-0lFr0L2Nh4KOLvTT62_JOktxQasxz2nk3BswKzCy4e)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

subject: Don't Forget: Volunteer Weekend for Max Ukropina
body:
This Saturday we kick off the New Year Campaigning for Max to win the primary election for District 47!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/maxforoc/volunteer-weekend-kick-off-for-max-ukropina-12675184?e=86e91e802d)

** Don't Forget:
------------------------------------------------------------

** This Saturday Jan 06, 2024,
------------------------------------------------------------

** 1:00 PM – 2:00 PM
------------------------------------------------------------

** Volunteer Weekend Kickoff
------------------------------------------------------------

** for Max Ukropina!
------------------------------------------------------------

** RSVP Below
------------------------------------------------------------

If the specified time doesn't work for you, we're seeking volunteers for door knocking and phone calling throughout the week. Reach out to Richard for additional information on how you can start. It’s GO TIME!

call or text (562) 230 -7521

We also need volunteers for saturday morning door knocking. Please text Richard if you would like to door knock before the event.

We will provide lunch at the office for all our Saturday morning door knockers.

Volunteer Kick Off DETAILS

Jan 06, 2024, 1:00 PM – 2:00 PM

Newport Beach, 4600 Campus Dr., Newport Beach, CA

Don't forget to bring your smartphone and earphones!

Come to the Campaign Headquarters and meet the Max Ukropina campaign team, including Andrew Clark from Trump's 2020 campaign. He will share exclusive stories you won't hear in the media. Let's make history and create amazing memories!

We will kick off the weekend with the following.
* Meet and greet volunteers.
* Snacks and drinks.
* Hearing from Andrew Clark during his time on the TRUMP TEAM.
* A word from Max Ukropina about the Campaign.
* and MOST IMPORTANTLY - Campaign Outreach:
+ Phone banking: Calling potential voters to gather information, promote Max Ukropina, and encourage voter turnout.
o (We will be making phone calls after the meeting)
+ Door knocking: Going door-to-door to distribute campaign literature, engage with voters, and raise awareness about Max's campaign.
o (We will go walking for those that can and want to door knock)

Please RSVP today and join Team Ukropina to defend Orange County Values.
RSVP (https://www.maxforoc.com/event-details/volunteer-weekend-kickoff-for-max-ukropina-1?utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=35abd148c3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_28_06_26_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-32863976e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Please text Richard for any questions regarding our event January 6th.
------------------------------------------------------------

562-230-7521

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb164ef7665846bc8c6ec80ebdc7ccb9&_e=F2PM66m4VqxFEFbSH74rhQoQpWDwemoIbVvopnO90qko14zIV7PaFqPD6wwUrIWUrJ2LG42X6Oam_Md5RwJSs7zwNZRkbsfr4eFQh3WTZEHWyV7nIYIaB0AhQlKY45EEzmFuznAIs8J3_3jhm1gJDB-CA0ygUhRtpOF7So_o-ZupOzfbokZZqv_dAcXpp_v0jDI41_kOrySGDfvq-WiQngWvo0gs5GugaTD1G-HZq2aRBCKD6uNWNHlkSyat_55QwIDWEn7DmfaCRiwWogwZJu9cDT4g7jj4ksUrqaZra891jK41uUz9Gznpyw1iOWr7MtCpDL65fsrwoRgPZk1rQM09VOieSjGiwGeeiayZmt31tsoLExwf0OX_wHREMcxU009N22iT8Ukxjj5OC1trvFu7gaPQ_E9CVCHSgvWQom0%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb164ef7665846bc8c6ec80ebdc7ccb9&_e=F2PM66m4VqxFEFbSH74rhQoQpWDwemoIbVvopnO90qko14zIV7PaFqPD6wwUrIWUrJ2LG42X6Oam_Md5RwJSs7zwNZRkbsfr4eFQh3WTZEHWyV7nIYIaB0AhQlKY45EEzmFuznAIs8J3_3jhm1gJDB-CA0ygUhRtpOF7So_o-ZupOzfbokZZqv_dAcXpp_v0jDI41_kOrySGDfvq-WiQngWvo0gs5GugaTD1G-HZq2aRBCKD6uNWNHlkSyat_55Qxd6-hP7YhouS2nLqY6k7AsfF4vVmAnRMJZkjV03d07ggGl6IGOaj0nb3aEfbVfJwJ2uJXEG2VusWOXtrximhhiVIphXEH33l9UoIX2weAoXDbsqW-E6UD0aCh29bZbm9wYJSc2w2kiWrOT4b6YhtwmOik3vluN1wt_7KWdYOC0U%3D)

body:
👋 Hi there, friend!
| | |
---
👋 Hi there, friend!
It's Emily, Debbie's digital director. I hope you had a happy holiday season! **Now that we've officially entered the election year, reaching out to you is the number one item on my to-do list.**
As one of Debbie's earliest online supporters, you have incredibly valuable insights about this race, Debbie's campaign, and our digital strategy. Your feedback will be absolutely critical to my work from now all the way through to Election Day. That's why I've put together a special early _2024 Priorities Survey_ exclusively for top supporters like you.

In a few seconds, I am going to ask you to make your first donation to President Biden's reelection campaign. But, first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it matters so much right now. **January is a crucial month for our campaign. Plain and simple.** What we fundraise this month will determine _how strong our organizing presence will be_ in early primary states. It’ll shape our budgets for how much the campaign can spend on _digital and TV ads to get the President’s message out_ to voters before November. And, most obvious of all, _it is the first month of the election year_. As the Republican presidential nominee pool narrows, everyone will be watching to see how we do: whether that be the press, our opponents, or supporters who have been waiting in the wings to see the strength of our movement. That’s why we’re relying on this grassroots team to step up to the plate early -- **_when it matters most_**. The amount you give matters far less than the donation itself, because it will all add up when we're in it together.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoLkLNIcOSc5AV915L-6j1KGM6ofX0rxHNk_9BEsLXCB3Wk73eEd2oenqAb6TTQU11XieWkYB3GuuwAN6lXw-957ZHEeswOz_JepwgzkjA9LzPbHCxDzNFymMpN792YZGjuxtmbbST9PndBuv8hg2ko7dOPBd4_GS9KrAwEwj4E25AOUIUQhoQEIwKWwMBqlcUdFjCMchiJcPDzCdPK8e6R_Ki6Cly3ClT3tk376R1pRzmiSgDus9wXsQjhz5XLiF8oCK7s0bbgn-DWWqErv0ypn/42n/2zenstVlQNC2dBUSi1bIhw/h7/LZra6Yyz_tKdSAXG_sMkzo2ebaUlwNTxLQZ-I0ZcpRI)

clean_body: | | | In a few seconds, I am going to ask you to make your first donation to President Biden's reelection campaign. But, first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it matters so much right now. January is a crucial month for our campaign. Plain and simple. What we fundraise this month will determine how strong our organizing presence will be in early primary states. It’ll shape our budgets for how much the campaign can spend on digital and TV ads to get the President’s message out to voters before November. And, most obvious of all, it is the first month of the election year. As the Republican presidential nominee pool narrows, everyone will be watching to see how we do: whether that be the press, our opponents, or supporters who have been waiting in the wings to see the strength of our movement. That’s why we’re relying on this grassroots team to step up to the plate early -- when it matters most. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Peter, we cannot wait until the days leading up to the election to invest in winning this race. If we do, we will lose. Thanks for being on this team, Peter. Jess Jessica Porter Grassroots Fundraising Director Biden-Harris 2024

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqsnomf7l5ndtjmme8id9qs1082qrvnqk3hmcqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0be6tp801bk39ka8hgjp0p7kmdgiuj4mng9og20_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrab48abb0dc70rknl4hcsd3vhitsi18dtsnkv0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjv10mqjf8sq87abaf4r195tgn55t214o6se0qe0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3vglrldb05u94jol3j3m8t4cv3gnjgd10ev60hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z594nm7ogn4rgc9g0d21k6vjpnmg320bq1pnmfn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9cvacd6jcpan8ar8m4gfirpin6pqmcsiepvmdco_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojefn54ciss8qbl494cb69a7pvf41eg6gdgtoro_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za1hm11k0i9fohjm9h1a024gfhl66mk0hd3s8l18_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ak02fstb4qstp963clpi5l7kb3kr5475q775ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg02co77q0p1ig0pd0v2o98qe0ak5c4sunn5sr0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlhiauq2jo2e73iea5bjgse4o74djhguacqsbrqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9a75cduko50q1kqppo12e5htju1vnodiv1a38o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67g9muoei6ef9eie8anq96tba33iu6aa35u7ttg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo63tt2lpk1chubpeucib42onl86jppr490g9aso_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zohknk2asntsh9355f99j2hj1m860uu8sp29klm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv88nuv3orn3shaaj8l3pa69nce14bbhitpabc8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gm0o31c3h2bs)
---

body:
I need to talk to you

| [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b04d5b7fa7564e7cb04c17f4f4ddfb89&_e=Vf3fgAyX3kxl4oQPRMsL3X1UJltrVw_NXGUYRhEjW_-hS5Tk0CYzSgNEG-PxoCJTT_HITUH2CRm5CDa4ZnXOkSjdWmZWMtwt9N9_KAqhwJ7jWotpNFm0A1gUrPzasFFyvscCo7UTHnUj66ePxXt0jQtfvsMiWskM-nNK5xvtb82eMleoFREHDkk_XNJpnTBAFyFi8HezuUzhwlJxYQ5r-hH4ASxwHiCZqBJvrUS-9hMN1BgvkUZkPC8EPFC0_UYrbqpvaEvpBhwyREuFwN-UCVQpsCubqWTEGTq2EvJ0BJDtIdDBUEGmCgpAFaOCEyc7XB0QIaB9ZZvzy3B2mw0ZXTf0cDtHojVYDBzrA9tuHaQGbgq0c0nLrI-D_bvLb48usvbil4bjD5iDElzxe_3MYQ%3D%3D)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: New Year, Same Faithful God
body:
Phoenix was a POWERFUL time of PRAISE and WORSHIP| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=473c6cde65fe4af68b371c7f362e9f17&_e=novRebIyieiLGG7CGP_X8w7hnH1vT4a0CtsWyB4E7dMus8rt1IZdQpLJc_66uo_-wdCz18x_UCYKpkFtbiRbZl3d5AG9xbueu6moma_udXmL9TxTmFZG1bqi4hvvAxSBMWcp4Wc7JleJ7LuwhFozF59W24kC66LJoIC29_kMu-8QXrTMQa1D8cYMsIKrgEt2YOLnqsBk34fL5eWAPxSmBKzDTmao3Lmv2pdsx3-2ZZZqa6e0Eawi0UKDbhlNopQwBnW5Ct0NRv67SYON0zRcmBwIPjzu6qIMIBnHJfde_gJOJ1Of3FD1Co5Q1V-2GBKM)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Happy New Year from me and the Let Us Worship team! I hope 2024 is off to a great start for you— I know it certainly is for me! Why? Because it started my favorite way—gathered together with Believers from all across America praising and worshiping the Most High!
_**Check the recap below!**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=473c6cde65fe4af68b371c7f362e9f17&_e=novRebIyieiLGG7CGP_X8w7hnH1vT4a0CtsWyB4E7dMus8rt1IZdQpLJc_66uo_-wdCz18x_UCYKpkFtbiRbZl3d5AG9xbueu6moma_udXmL9TxTmFZG1bqi4hvvAxSBMWcp4Wc7JleJ7LuwhFozF59W24kC66LJoIC29_kMu-__uUb7fvnnH0JRd8K2nMp04uwafLYXtKEHPPVIvl_9BoB41LwTCFS3QeTvQsPWWfPL3WFdEa7JV1dYcQbBEs7FOBbk9sOauZ9lstHNJEoRJbjg7dEaBGAlVpGkqtzyHNLvxvQfkykIsKLgHYIJftJw)
---
New Year's Eve in Phoenix was _ POWERFUL _and if you missed it, you missed out. Luckily, we put together a 🔥🔥🔥 recap video that shows just how amazing it is to ring in the new year in the presence of God! If you would like to watch the whole NYE revival, we've got you covered—you can watch it **[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=473c6cde65fe4af68b371c7f362e9f17&_e=novRebIyieiLGG7CGP_X8zyZlfYJ3ycymdjDIXiFzhrQngjq1IqVh-rtAAcCfdUUWlgoMeyMlPYybOvJl1oo9y-VOZZCST3lddazmBmRfc3-A3kaf_CvorGEvZqUNQ2y-H3UJeqoE3YaNBk1zlCY0Uo7LtxnV3OS2miRuBbO_hNzxo3esGdP0SxnoFGrEbpRwLt60GiAufQ0zhuln44G9lfSKQemBbvGsn-FaKUb4yQO4RN2mycyFJkQrJ5zvo265IIJEsHQlHIK9iWPG0fGNiBbVAphPxKUyuEcPHu1CqCP0GtcvZ46H_9p7iBGNWZs)**.
---
[**WATCH GOD WORK ON NYE >>> **](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=473c6cde65fe4af68b371c7f362e9f17&_e=novRebIyieiLGG7CGP_X8w7hnH1vT4a0CtsWyB4E7dMus8rt1IZdQpLJc_66uo_-wdCz18x_UCYKpkFtbiRbZl3d5AG9xbueu6moma_udXmL9TxTmFZG1bqi4hvvAxSBMWcp4Wc7JleJ7LuwhFozF59W24kC66LJoIC29_kMu--RxEjzom_qEM0MKE9OB_JDFqwYYNGgmH8u4SmGl2z-zZrVJGhBO5sc4NaHum9iDyZ9pmCNgsuMBfyIrVUHGQJ6h65MxQ3Igq3Bc963vac2UtOgWJ03iUtONfW-OrpjR7nFLfOuVzZa_bokeEX7iO96)
---
Till All Hear,
---
---

clean_body: Phoenix was a POWERFUL time of PRAISE and WORSHIP| | | Dear Friend, Happy New Year from me and the Let Us Worship team! I hope 2024 is off to a great start for you— I know it certainly is for me! Why? Because it started my favorite way—gathered together with Believers from all across America praising and worshiping the Most High! Check the recap below! New Year's Eve in Phoenix was POWERFUL and if you missed it, you missed out. Luckily, we put together a 🔥🔥🔥 recap video that shows just how amazing it is to ring in the new year in the presence of God! If you would like to watch the whole NYE revival, we've got you covered—you can watch it . Till All Hear, Sean | | - | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS — DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NE Washington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

Hello Peter! The very first thing I want to do in 2024 is to say thank you. Grassroots donations are what enable our team to invest in building Democratic success and keeping up the fight for our rights. So many of you stepped up to make those grassroots contributions in 2023, and I could not be more grateful for your dedicated support. **As we begin the election year, I think there’s no better way to start off than by connecting with you.** **[I’m sending you my 2024 New Year’s Priorities Survey to hear your thoughts on the issues facing our communities. body:
Together, we've achieved incredible things

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2070c4365f264ad4b1fa6a0ea5843e86&_e=ID0O1A9lcnglfoHesQ8j5y05qBfXyxSzoblsCTLaB-sIYAOqTO19U81ccX12sh1JcCR6bhs_5UnY5nW158ZeJ1RWo11bCPBLwkb6idQhZermdnFJDDy9zut55h4P7LUhcjxXYEHJeDD6ds5WqsdDyHSxrYTfnV0jD2h5XvqbVsNXaV-cKtG99ldhxb2qBAJQTfGuXObLr0XAGGWB8beQ4DcvDjPhGLEF5kLZDaDgiqTnb3LmvyO7Vke2MhNn3qfk4kszWw7ihDHvBNT7X6BS7UMCc9kX6FGB2BctJ-tm5JjQr-q5Yg77yunug8fJDFXaVL580W7dMGx6rKhdZOnNeIjVqsnPdlpKBNVd0bVfDqxfDuPLNjP7XoprZI3EOUmRCuD86-beGywVUT3fTJ5Gv-Wzyr8DuiIwCu5aTYtSKdqv_k3mheBta9evyewyxWbyfBoV9g4-crWwn06WI-HUy9QmqXyLQLP4cVF9S1AIqa1bXcxpDGlYXh2x58PknLk958-vxVB70XrrEBpF_1Juo7ap_0J-yp1Que1XH5ZC5KP227sbQppyBJsdoYxwuE0X3882qMPMipO76YvVDeYaxHao174CL6iWP61ayNczI6gjvg5ts2lubO1EWVYMmlrMFgbGa0cMdojbwnZlGeVMEQ%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2070c4365f264ad4b1fa6a0ea5843e86&_e=ID0O1A9lcnglfoHesQ8j5y05qBfXyxSzoblsCTLaB-sIYAOqTO19U81ccX12sh1JcCR6bhs_5UnY5nW158ZeJ1RWo11bCPBLwkb6idQhZermdnFJDDy9zut55h4P7LUhcjxXYEHJeDD6ds5WqsdDyHSxrYTfnV0jD2h5XvqbVsNXaV-cKtG99ldhxb2qBAJQTfGuXObLr0XAGGWB8beQ4DcvDjPhGLEF5kLZDaDgiqTnb3LmvyO7Vke2MhNn3qfk4kszWw7ihDHvBNT7X6BS7UMCc9kX6FGB2BctJ-tm5JjQr-q5Yg77yunug8fJDFXaVL580W7dMGx6rKhdZOnNeIjVqsnPdlpKBNVd0bVfDqxfDuPLNjP7XoprZI3EOUmRCuD86-beGywVUT3fTJ5Gv-Wzyr8DuiIwCu5aTYtSKdqv_k3mheBta9evyewyxWbyfBoV9g4-crWwn06WI-HUy9QmqXyLQLP4cVF9S1AIqa1bXcxpDGlYXh2x58PknLk90pNSrccFbeECtpLEjmK9RCzYsvt3uS_3WE6jcHVovSyithtBihFDenckqy6hTkiJ-nLxEeiIYOmx2H1J8w8lUnYh1t6EpA8Mn7sTuLrCdzf6ClgdNW9V9u6lvJRcOUYchUNZJC4m-OOWf7ie2FlkBg%3D%3D)
---

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in less than three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

**[Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2070c4365f264ad4b1fa6a0ea5843e86&_e=ID0O1A9lcnglfoHesQ8j5y05qBfXyxSzoblsCTLaB-sIYAOqTO19U81ccX12sh1JcCR6bhs_5UnY5nW158ZeJ1RWo11bCPBLwkb6idQhZermdnFJDDy9zut55h4P7LUhcjxXYEHJeDD6ds5WqsdDyHSxrYTfnV0jD2h5XvqbVsNXaV-cKtG99ldhxb2qBAJQTfGuXObLr0XAGGWB8beQ4DcvDjPhGLEF5kLZDaDgiqTnb3LmvyO7Vke2MhNn3qfk4kszWw7ihDHvBNT7X6BS7UMCc9kX6FGB2BctJ-tm5JjQr-q5Yg77yunug8fJDFXaVL580W7dMGx6rKhdZOnNeIjVqsnPdlpKBNVd0bVfDqxfDuPLNjP7XoprZI3EOUmRCuD86-beGywVUT3fTJ5Gv-Wzyr8DuiIwCu5aTYtSKdqv_k3mheBta9evyewyxWbyfBoV9g4-crWwn06WI-HUy9QmqXyLQLP4cVF9S1AIqa1bXcxpDGlYXh2x58PknLk9JSSZwXxv1i3Bo6m5z17ElbVY7r7ADL0Hy3lV5NfFUBKUcM1U9aQYHaCqodShj-4LaU6tRDR30DdDZoz3lj1KxRZX14ls2jXc1C2IXjpvzsd_XtnupEm6p0eugLe7NiPsFfGB0lJuj3yWdKJW-tjKUg%3D%3D "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? My very best,
