My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2070c4365f264ad4b1fa6a0ea5843e86&_e=ID0O1A9lcnglfoHesQ8j5y05qBfXyxSzoblsCTLaB-sIYAOqTO19U81ccX12sh1JyOpSwzoo2PTJvi_wDhesKBjn25253u1SBwsHRYQIqq0NiCmO73GJ84kAEQ-MhZRvSDCDYzpzcrHAmZnxUZ5rwItsR6ExTL3xIEgHXKwvw884qW-jaTj5uQZF0luqc5QqWr5dhghZQIRhJeRbhfdygT0kDgWD1Q7dZ8-5sWRQx859hKWpdjAPzS_DBhhM4txXEG52i28-hQrSDRTcvOxh-HANbT2eU-0PmvDYCI6w-6RXf3TFWrM1DnHQTJgsB---EqG11gbODFfFcs_v7XDjIdstHX-w9gW0i7vbk9XOo4WFjBScjZ4V38RhnxygdTAh9H4QyRu_ciqKADjuTejeNnxYBDkC2phmt8H0JBUI6om9WErXYG2HjAyYi0eMZxs_Cz44g78NytHD9lReJQ8dBif0fE72f-yqlY5vcEewdAJMquG3QYy68qxenNs35sfVcTgKLgQZNimGxRit_bV04LXLeDnkZl17dapq-TlJf2iSZnGaO8eVXwJnOjz1kkDmQmo3IOsMUNTHbQytL9tkymRgxLfucpN4yIbYYDErKCZOeAwG85zPIM4gj84O0PvBkBK2H8OF8vFK93536NZQ7Q%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Together, we've achieved incredible things | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support. Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship. | Together, we've achieved incredible things: Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people. Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina! Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable. Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire. Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters. Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into the crucial Iowa caucuses in less than three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that. But there is still much to do. We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory. "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My latest endorsement

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: our last goal of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Thank you so much, Peter.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce — I hope your new year has gotten off to a great start.
We’re still counting all the numbers, but I’m happy to report that **after my last update on Sunday we beat our goal of raising 40,000 grassroots donations in Q4 2023.**
Insiders thought I was crazy when I decided to run this campaign the right way — with $0 from corporate PACs or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs. But since we launched one year ago this week, tens of thousands of working people have come together to help us meet our goals every single time, no matter how ambitious they are.
**My whole team and I are so humbled by the trust and support you showed this movement last year.** With your help, we traveled across the state to meet with voters in their communities, held Josh Hawley accountable with some scathing new ads, and built a truly record-breaking and worker-led coalition to take back power for everyday people and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**Now, we’ve got to keep that MO-mentum going.**
If we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country come November, we have a lot of work to do. From continuing to staff up to opening field offices and getting our election-winning message in front of voters — your support is the only thing that makes all that possible for our campaign.
I can’t tell you how much your support in 2023 means to me, Peter. I’m so glad to have you on this team and I can’t wait to see what else we’ll accomplish together.
It’s officially election year. Now let’s go win this thing.
Lucas Kunce

_**— A message from Team Kunce —**_ Three years ago this week, Josh Hawley embarrassed himself and all of Missouri on January 6th. Now, he’s the most vulnerable Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election this year — with approvals even lower than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott! **GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors have already spent millions to make Hawley look strong — and there’s no telling what else they’ll do over the next 11 months to tear down Lucas and buy this race.[Will you help our campaign stay prepared by rushing a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40636?refcode=em20240102-4522&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4522%2E614464%2E3WuJq5)** **[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40636?refcode=em20240102-4522&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4522%2E614464%2E3WuJq5)**
---

Each victory brings a direct, positive impact to our communities. Democrats are fighting to increase the minimum wage, protect our democracy, protect abortion, and so much more.
Our state legislators have a huge impact on our day-to-day lives – and we must continue electing Democrats committed to advancing our Democratic agenda in our state legislatures.

Last year, Democrats secured victories in over 30 special elections, defended our majority in the Pennsylvania House, expanded our power in New Jersey and New Hampshire, and fended off a right-wing trifecta in Virginia. Each victory brings a direct, positive impact to our communities. Democrats are fighting to increase the minimum wage, protect our democracy, protect abortion, and so much more. Our state legislators have a huge impact on our day-to-day lives – and we must continue electing Democrats committed to advancing our Democratic agenda in our state legislatures. Can we count on your support? Let’s go! Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . I hate that we were right about this

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd3bb72b9c134f00b95bb8e01a8d3428&_e=aLlsEKQrA-Sb1menvYByYh6FKI7whhem325gSy-dZX-GOEqTDCaxnm5loRL6FoqKmnRf4M0Mz3wueGjLJa7jZWNzsG8sINjqsdwZfetJ2Ky4B5EYtCZZUOkMfk0qvzJcigW9aPo5MNeSOjYscrCS5VIZ1s8U_GjyO2QKhbfTKnCnxMgbKmgn5mRQS9iWfVH_o7HArGZM1q-oRDw7ld5aK3ky45Iz4Hr67F5wLA5B9ezrobbLXKW6LIsIB4DBVMZTyMNYqyEQ6Ad09LPu3HjFXmE4aa4jjJWivw5h6ERSsO7Rk7dJNp-xTY0uCzD6uZjUeW1D9fxOIkKuinSxlY9RTA3FlZO3-JOYncGgx47bsh_PR_BiZDr-59wloCovaBrq0PVBg805R4NWyN8jYAL3dQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot, I hate that we were right about this.

As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we've been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism...
**_And now, our worst fears came true._** Soros-funded activists secured victory when two states recently **disqualified** the former president from appearing on the 2024 presidential primary ballot.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd3bb72b9c134f00b95bb8e01a8d3428&_e=aLlsEKQrA-Sb1menvYByYh6FKI7whhem325gSy-dZX-GOEqTDCaxnm5loRL6FoqKmnRf4M0Mz3wueGjLJa7jZWNzsG8sINjqsdwZfetJ2Ky4B5EYtCZZUOkMfk0qvzJcigW9aPo5MNeSOjYscrCS5VIZ1s8U_GjyO2QKhbfTKnCnxMgbKmgn5mRQS9iWfVH_o7HArGZM1q-oRDw7ld5aK3ky45Iz4Hr67F5wLA5B9exgB0t0Hkqdn6P6qUrvVAnNaa9e9xVLTrFTCNZswJdrRGIN-x_ZH-yW72cBhRNf5H5ypDkJfD3wZY8AWV4vtlt2-cILXS9ehw-cSXj2U0oI2bc6fFQnbaMJ6HGxnc5xJGY6FaYMnJz0EusHqCzvSSxlqUnlv3D1wSBdhF0bVEyO8w%3D%3D)
---
It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these.

**We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.**

_**[Fair Courts America exists to put a stop to all that.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd3bb72b9c134f00b95bb8e01a8d3428&_e=aLlsEKQrA-Sb1menvYByYh6FKI7whhem325gSy-dZX-GOEqTDCaxnm5loRL6FoqKmnRf4M0Mz3wueGjLJa7jZWNzsG8sINjqsdwZfetJ2Ky4B5EYtCZZUOkMfk0qvzJcigW9aPo5MNeSOjYscrCS5VIZ1s8U_GjyO2QKhbfTKnCnxMgbKmgn5mRQS9iWfVH_o7HArGZM1q-oRDw7ld5aK3ky45Iz4Hr67F5wLA5B9exDVWlPdsge47-pIYKb8xQUw13YZRT_nIPZX_T1Z78Sv9ARYmV4Kstq9XaDngkc6haJ4KbCh6NEu1IMNd7FHOMZAUKFxC8Vqx3fDKmoG257UQWzWQ9KS92u8PnreQtiHYUbSeq8FJrDwFjXGvtpb7lDrvEAYXl1dFG18qQMbpT9EQ%3D%3D)**_

We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can't use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies.

If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It's as simple as that.

**As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it's too late?**
---

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: we warned you

body:
I hate that we were right about this

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c293f653ce84387ab34e70af8ba755c&_e=bi4cvLNXmqmpFp-T6zzvQh3hzyz1mqDO4LYrtg4GSJnnUHGeE-oHM5xBeScmSZ1L1ALqAHpRN00t5gDDMR-s_hRUMF2N7xcP7GZBkJkfVl1d5qzUhuLB2l8dWebXpRHFeS1CdEoqH7Yml-9H1HxTneU_nzkN18J1TQTIaGaThnRRA87Xd_drinw4IyRmIJgFlTsndaenTl6_15G3wDRGGLzGHAeu7gnYe6KKJ6oxhCUPrnc_2fUwPEnj2klpamG9JR6JmZdW1GC59001j4bjj5hhncxPL1xxk7yQl-9Irk4ocv0VxQPl12Xfe_ee_0vxleWdw1kPIvM5uecBJbuwX4fP5sm6wAN5JoMkczT8D793Zmcc0OJfFyOi1-m8TlWGfvOWdrBNsa-YmcB0ky0xfA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I hate that we were right about this.

As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we've been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism...
**_And now, our worst fears came true._** Soros-funded activists secured victory when two states recently **disqualified** the former president from appearing on the 2024 presidential primary ballot.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c293f653ce84387ab34e70af8ba755c&_e=bi4cvLNXmqmpFp-T6zzvQh3hzyz1mqDO4LYrtg4GSJnnUHGeE-oHM5xBeScmSZ1L1ALqAHpRN00t5gDDMR-s_hRUMF2N7xcP7GZBkJkfVl1d5qzUhuLB2l8dWebXpRHFeS1CdEoqH7Yml-9H1HxTneU_nzkN18J1TQTIaGaThnRRA87Xd_drinw4IyRmIJgFlTsndaenTl6_15G3wDRGGLzGHAeu7gnYe6KKJ6oxhCVC8ae2rIWaCbjnJbRuK89kdz_i2Hg72cz7c4kzOXovq86j2gaPWU97t82_9A05PDWystXi18aftwcRJka0SONbN1bxqOskSWmTN-_RQ75HXez91Egy4RtxuTo5LuI4SFaaw6uYfTaFewkuafn_TdunyB0ELeuIxmUBeHu7vJ8KVw%3D%3D)
---
It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these.

**We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.**

_**[Fair Courts America exists to put a stop to all that.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c293f653ce84387ab34e70af8ba755c&_e=bi4cvLNXmqmpFp-T6zzvQh3hzyz1mqDO4LYrtg4GSJnnUHGeE-oHM5xBeScmSZ1L1ALqAHpRN00t5gDDMR-s_hRUMF2N7xcP7GZBkJkfVl1d5qzUhuLB2l8dWebXpRHFeS1CdEoqH7Yml-9H1HxTneU_nzkN18J1TQTIaGaThnRRA87Xd_drinw4IyRmIJgFlTsndaenTl6_15G3wDRGGLzGHAeu7gnYe6KKJ6oxhCUrZigiMiQ18vH98zFioaI8djTrvMRrBrLzJsARSKm99ZhjR1nPhwGc76jYyYGWAF751CupCFNB0HnSETJM-LUfjKvg_2_hXcNYrnQKHFFAGaVXahwOkx8Nbpq9L-m0cb7F98k4w6tNnoBc_G0v_tDqaBOBmlZytjDCPDOq2U3LQg%3D%3D)**_

We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can't use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies.

If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It's as simple as that.

**As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it's too late?**
---
**[YES: I WILL JOIN THE FIGHT!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c293f653ce84387ab34e70af8ba755c&_e=bi4cvLNXmqmpFp-T6zzvQh3hzyz1mqDO4LYrtg4GSJnnUHGeE-oHM5xBeScmSZ1L1ALqAHpRN00t5gDDMR-s_hRUMF2N7xcP7GZBkJkfVl1d5qzUhuLB2l8dWebXpRHFeS1CdEoqH7Yml-9H1HxTneU_nzkN18J1TQTIaGaThnRRA87Xd_drinw4IyRmIJgFlTsndaenTl6_15G3wDRGGLzGHAeu7gnYe6KKJ6oxhCWP-gbTODrMKoMtRs9N-5Pm4BLDP_ha79tlSUYi3llrDZs3Aoi-V2IG3p_-GTzGK8NxfrPaxQYQskXBrNvQeqzzenFjBM5Rl7kK9eHf_6IEK9f9z8pe8rksrd0K7ut6v3_CLRGJHdaCU9-xR9cVkMZUYLagCESwGzEIM2-5HAjiUg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I hate that we were right about this | | | Fellow Patriot, I hate that we were right about this. As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we've been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism... And now, our worst fears came true. Soros-funded activists secured victory when two states recently disqualified the former president from appearing on the 2024 presidential primary ballot. It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these. We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system. We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can't use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies. If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It's as simple as that. As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it's too late? | | | | | Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | | | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
We're living in a pivotal time.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50beb6a5f31f4e73947068b9c9e5f05b&_e=iFQZdCdQpJ--ATKpBTDvbG64-aXZ_HCzZiZPOy8aQ5e2PNJRk4NepORltcPUVDGUeqtfEC0J2h3b7cw27YIKF_M82TEAu3LHRvJPMH_UUtWul_biXh-ZBoxPcS3kjAFKtC0toRvePrhUfAWr-N8LuT1Xlb3u-sCzbpNktCmVsayni4yAVt8IBlr780WDBIoCTyTUCE0JJ8e_0yG2dHmEH5_uI-FadntJFCP77P4fIO65__CKdg4T1H71CCA48HDSyaF0SJCnxyP8bHQay_zuhUAss7nNenJycvRNn9eIlwA%3D)

Friend, We're living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty-- which is God's idea, not man's idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50beb6a5f31f4e73947068b9c9e5f05b&_e=iFQZdCdQpJ--ATKpBTDvbG64-aXZ_HCzZiZPOy8aQ5e2PNJRk4NepORltcPUVDGUeqtfEC0J2h3b7cw27YIKF_M82TEAu3LHRvJPMH_UUtWul_biXh-ZBoxPcS3kjAFKtC0toRvePrhUfAWr-N8LudmYBCB90YPCAPUJ0YggD3HGQldH0foxbcMfXrX1KgBRzqnrBCExFZlf2EgPpJSrT12nZYRO9XWiaNGKRRJqlEMo0n4uqxiSCq9h9uhvtQ7SMVM2AaKaVTd0LHRbDtM6qO8_g6XpT6sozm9DNVP9nBw%3D)**

**_God 's Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of "wokeism" disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their "gender transition." Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith's mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50beb6a5f31f4e73947068b9c9e5f05b&_e=iFQZdCdQpJ--ATKpBTDvbG64-aXZ_HCzZiZPOy8aQ5e2PNJRk4NepORltcPUVDGUeqtfEC0J2h3b7cw27YIKF_M82TEAu3LHRvJPMH_UUtWul_biXh-ZBoxPcS3kjAFKtC0toRvePrhUfAWr-N8LuXz6VfsqxtxA5MdF7XXr-WAkbTztfUC_sGwRQBHmz8NSXer1pp153EMj5zWdt2ISMnNO7LImroao7K-1VMTG36nbMhi9Uai0LEEvlVQpUCx09uUtyAMqmogETgGb2HhGLGRID_iRh8ikx58Vn4Z1I2w%3D)**

[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50beb6a5f31f4e73947068b9c9e5f05b&_e=iFQZdCdQpJ--ATKpBTDvbG64-aXZ_HCzZiZPOy8aQ5e2PNJRk4NepORltcPUVDGUeqtfEC0J2h3b7cw27YIKF_M82TEAu3LHRvJPMH_UUtWul_biXh-ZBoxPcS3kjAFKtC0toRvePrhUfAWr-N8LuXhJwBgUlOoob0DOoGuKWD5x1wwGIPRwDEUmuWkCyI70HLIXoKSxQ5WKq5iRGLLeU2PJuf177XdFva09Eucf8-fghaCxClnvUDAPFvTOHkgoXN0mg_4P01byvisilpn4ZFC02m-lb-QP1UeSBqKkqso%3D)

Christians founded this country, Friend. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don't defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we're going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers' vision, it's our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50beb6a5f31f4e73947068b9c9e5f05b&_e=iFQZdCdQpJ--ATKpBTDvbG64-aXZ_HCzZiZPOy8aQ5e2PNJRk4NepORltcPUVDGUeqtfEC0J2h3b7cw27YIKF_M82TEAu3LHRvJPMH_UUtWul_biXh-ZBoxPcS3kjAFKtC0toRvePrhUfAWr-N8LubhZHyB1ypx5pOafPk1E5LkHYqM05IYDfeaOR9j69IYH1c-ohlej0w0a_9xIcLxOr5VedEjB37Ol-nWqBgRFQWDaMCsQSXKnTC-fernGbmOVsTgjEsA_ajGv2MOTdn4kwWouI2mMVk0Sf2DzoB8Srjs%3D)** Thank you for your support! #### **True the Vote Defeats Fair Fight, Stacy Abrams, Marc Elias, and the Biden Department of Justice in Landmark Election Case in Georgia Federal Court**
Fair Fight et al v. True the Vote et al | Case No. 2:20-cv-0302-SCJ
**HOUSTON, TX,** January 2, 2024 - True the Vote (TTV) declares a decisive triumph in their legal battle against Stacy Abrams' Fair Fight, legal teams led by Marc Elias, and the Biden Department of Justice. A federal court in the Northern District of Georgia today affirmed that citizens have the right to lawfully petition their government in support of election integrity without fear of persecution or prosecution.
In a resounding vindication, TTV successfully defended its actions of December 2020, aiding Georgia citizens in filing elector challenges based on data showing over 364,000 voters appeared to be ineligible to vote due to change in residency.
This victory is a testament to every American's constitutional right to free speech and the importance of actively participating in the electoral process.
True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht affirmed, "Today's ruling sends a clear message to those who would attempt to control the course of our nation through lawfare and intimidation. American citizens will not be silenced.”
True the Vote lead attorney Jake Evans stated, “After almost three years of litigation and a two-week federal trial with plaintiff calling 12 witnesses, Judge Steven Jones awarded a complete defense verdict for all defendants. This decision is monumental. It vindicates True the Vote in totality and establishes that eligibility challenges under Section 230 are a proper method to ensure voter rolls are accurate. I am grateful to help achieve this great victory.”
Engelbrecht added, "This is an answer to the prayers of faithful patriots across America."
True the Vote remains steadfast in its mission to support trustworthy elections and looks forward to assisting citizens in future such lawful efforts.

name: Susan Wild
subject: A moment to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Thanks to generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our fundraising goal of $25,000 and finish 2023 strong.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76363494/447298385/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA1YjA4ZC1iM2E5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFniycFvILu-rsCX9F2UjbcK5oPJ-YoMREXxxKljgMM=)
---
| Hi Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. **Thanks to generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our fundraising goal of $25,000 and finish 2023 strong.**

Thanks to you, in the coming months, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time working on the issues that matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure.

Now that we’re officially in an election year, the fight will only get tougher from here.

We can’t stop now. We need to keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this seat and flip the House blue in November.

With your support, I look forward to continuing my work into 2024 and beyond Peter.

Thank you,
Susan
---

clean_body: Thanks to generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our fundraising goal of $25,000 and finish 2023 strong. | = | Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our fundraising goal of $25,000 and finish 2023 strong. Thanks to you, in the coming months, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time working on the issues that matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure. Now that we’re officially in an election year, the fight will only get tougher from here. We can’t stop now. We need to keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this seat and flip the House blue in November. With your support, I look forward to continuing my work into 2024 and beyond Peter. Thank you, Susan | = | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0571e6eb87284ae3add727d742a60e09&_e=Tg17ecXFygN-8H9PEvlHL0co2wexyn6sBq-UaBCfyWk5VS92r4wN5oquVPMr3gMetTujavtsSWEzCLEja_uqlTsLudsCfOq3U4DfzMQbMyLP8SG6JKDtLVYHwArWASLBiTZKhfop-mDAy7qW_elhRnky_uecyhaCPbqXDiH8EzYno-2y9DNQKfT4W0nrmfHZXo1tBwJ8ho-jdJBCn7iBq1hUzFIm6jCdMskC8q7Yir7qnTZFPR0vvQJiGx6UGy3mlf4Ebbldkf3wJWXl6PGjIZOQvzMKJwJs6BmcJwRfvadlsvUkOEgTMl0DJ1M-H0boZx1Wq83RwGaLDt_0hc1fzG0___NtD1915HTdwS_Rp7VWlu786FEVTctIj7EK5Yy0-FV4swIqRLqPuT5hmzBArg%3D%3D)

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Let’s not forget how this started.
**Hamas terrorists executed a savage, surprise attack against Israeli citizens,****killing hundreds of innocent men, women, and children****. **
There is no other way to describe the attack than as a deliberate act of pure evil, and I feel no remorse in supporting Israel as they respond to that evil.
The attempt to intimidate me is another desperate tactic used by pro-Hamas supporters across the country, and a window into the increase in antisemitism by far-left radicals.
**But I will not abandon Israel. I will not abandon the Jewish people. And I will never apologize for condemning Hamas’ savagery. **
I hope I can count on you to stand beside me in this critical time.

clean_body: | | | | My office was vandalized on account of my support for Israel | Peter, Last Wednesday, the front entrance of my district office was defaced with anti-semitic messages attacking me for my support for Israel. Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated by these anti-semitic radicals & I will not waver from supporting our greatest ally as they fight to stop Hamas’ terror once and for all. If you stand beside me, if you support Israel, and if you believe in fighting terrorism,then I implore you to sign your name to an official statement of support. Let’s not forget how this started. Hamas terrorists executed a savage, surprise attack against Israeli citizens,killing hundreds of innocent men, women, and children. There is no other way to describe the attack than as a deliberate act of pure evil, and I feel no remorse in supporting Israel as they respond to that evil. The attempt to intimidate me is another desperate tactic used by pro-Hamas supporters across the country, and a window into the increase in antisemitism by far-left radicals. But I will not abandon Israel. I will not abandon the Jewish people. And I will never apologize for condemning Hamas’ savagery. I hope I can count on you to stand beside me in this critical time. Thank you, | | Mike Lawler Congressman, NY-17 | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. name: Gallego for Senate [OFFICIAL]
subject: Alarming January 6th Poll from The Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter:
We’re days away from the three year anniversary of the insurrection at the Capitol, and The Washington Post just released an alarming poll.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
After Trump’s supporters and staff coordinated and strategized for months to subvert the will of the people, after they attacked honorable elections officials and worked to steal votes, after they led an attack at the Capitol that left three dead and hundreds injured — the GOP is more loyal to Trump.
Fewer Republicans say Trump bears responsibility for the attack than ever before:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
Fewer say the insurrectionists were violent:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
And less than a third of Republicans think the 2020 election was legitimate:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
This is concerning news for all of us, and it reinforces something we have been saying for months.
The 2024 election isn’t just about holding the Senate or defeating Trump. It is about the future of our democracy itself.
Ruben has supporters across the aisle: Republican, Democratic, and in between. We want to understand what our top supporters are thinking ahead of this important anniversary, and that’s why we’re writing to you, Peter.
[**Use this link to complete the Official Gallego for Senate Issue Survey. This will only take a minute of your time, but it will be an immense help to our campaign as we start the Election Year this month.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
[COMPLETE THE SURVEY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_senate_survey_ruben_jan24/?source=em240102-1-15&refcode2=1645.734936.BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)
With so much happening in the world right now, the act of completing a survey like this might seem small. But it is absolutely essential that we continue to hear from our top supporters as we get closer and closer to the election.
We hope to hear from you,
Team Gallego
* * *

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2371?source=em240102-1-15&t=1&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=2&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1645_734936_BJGFbB&akid=1645%2E734936%2EBJGFbB)

The 2024 election isn’t just about holding the Senate or defeating Trump. It is about the future of our democracy itself. Ruben has supporters across the aisle: Republican, Democratic, and in between. We want to understand what our top supporters are thinking ahead of this important anniversary, and that’s why we’re writing to you, Peter. With so much happening in the world right now, the act of completing a survey like this might seem small. But it is absolutely essential that we continue to hear from our top supporters as we get closer and closer to the election. We hope to hear from you, Team Gallego * Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

From all of us at Justice Democrats: THANK YOU!

Thanks to this movement of progressive, grassroots supporters like you, we
not only reached our $75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal — we surpassed
it!

Every dollar will support our upcoming fights in this critical election
year. Now that we’re officially in 2024, we’re rapidly getting to work to
protect every Squad incumbent and expand our bloc of young, working-class,
diverse progressives in Congress.

With right-wing and corporate-funded opposition groups like AIPAC planning
to spend an unprecedented $100 million on attack ads and candidates
challenging the Squad, every dollar we raise from small-dollar donors
truly makes a difference.

The future of the Democratic Party, our progressive movement, and our
country as a whole is on the line in this year’s elections. The odds are
stacked against us — but they’ve always been. We’ve overcome them before
with your help, and I’m hopeful we will again with you by our side.

Thank you again for everything you’ve contributed to support Justice
Democrats in 2023 and start 2024 on the right track as we continue to
fight for the progress we deserve.

Happy New Year!

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240102.9rUAvZ&refcode=em20240102-32635&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32635%2E1203867%2EQ_agun ]Donate

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1002&akid=32635%2E1203867%2EQ_agun ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1003&akid=32635%2E1203867%2EQ_agun ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240102-32635-footer&t=1004&refcode2=32635_1203867_Q_agun&akid=32635%2E1203867%2EQ_agun

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=32635%2E1203867%2EQ_agun

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fw: Take Action to Protect Oregon’s State Forests!
body:
Help Us Keep Oregon State Forest Protections On Track! | | Hello Peter, The Oregon Board of Forestry is meeting tomorrow and we want to make sure they finalize the strongest Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) for Oregon’s Western State Forests. We know that the logging industry will show up to pressure them into weakening or even dumping the HCP altogether and we need to show up to protect it! A final decision won’t happen until near the end of the year, but every time there’s a Board of Forestry meeting we have to keep the pressure on in order to protect Oregon’s forests. **[Please take action today urging the Board of Forestry and Governor Kotek to finalize the strongest HCP possible!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363889/447299826/-700394016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230) ** Thank you,
Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Julia DeGraw [olcv@olcv.org]
Date: Tue, Dec. 12, 2023
Subject: Take Action to Protect Oregon’s State Forests!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363890/447299827/241075653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter,

Though the road is long and winding, we're getting ever closer to historic protections for salmon streams, wildlife habitat, mature forests, and clean water in our Western State Forests.

Thanks to you and the power of your voice demanding the strongest Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) possible, this past July, the Department of Forestry (ODF) began implementing many of the protections in the State Forest HCP that we’ve been supporting for the past two years. It’s clear that ODF is anticipating and preparing for the final federal approval of the HCP in late 2024.

That’s great news, but we haven’t won yet and with the Board of Forestry meeting on January 3rd it’s imperative that [**we speak up for strong habitat protections**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363891/447299828/241075653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230)—louder than the logging industry that still wants ODF to scrap this plan completely. Earlier this month, the Department of Forestry issued new logging estimates for the 70-year lifespan of the HCP. Under the revised estimates, logging will be reduced to more sustainable levels compared to the past 20 years of excessive logging of state forests. This is needed to restore balanced management on our state forests. But the logging industry and their political allies are using this information to try and derail the HCP process.

[**Can you speak up today in support of passing the HCP as it stands: a plan that strikes the best possible balance between logging and the many other critical values that Western State Forests provide to people and wildlife?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363892/447299829/241075653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230) This won’t be the last time we’ll need to speak up for strong habitat protections and conservation. The HCP is still at least one year away from federal approval. We’ll need to keep the pressure high or risk losing the progress we’ve made. The current HCP is a big gain for conserving crucial habitat for threatened and endangered species (such as salmon, and the marbled murrelet), and there are additional ways that we can further improve management of state forests:

* We must provide larger protective buffers on headwater streams. A recent peer-reviewed study on the Trask River supports HCP Alternative 3 with larger protective buffers on small streams; and
* We need to modernize the antiquated law that couples state forest timber revenue with funding for the counties: counties deserve more stable funding for local services.

We know there's more work to do, and we’re working hard to gain more ground in the coming months. [**But right now, the Board of Forestry needs to hear loud and clear that we want them to keep the HCP on track.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363893/447299830/241075653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230)

The logging industry won’t be satisfied until our state forests are managed like private industrial forests. And delay and derailment tactics are its specialty. For the sake of our remaining mature state forests and the clean drinking water and healthy fish and wildlife habitat they provide, let's keep this legacy plan on track. [**Please tell the Board of Forestry to finalize a strong HCP without delay!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76363894/447299831/241075653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMTc2OTRiLWI4YTktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c_RCLkb6FtIwDq6ljAxreDvU7-RN2CqEqmURFPrIEA4=&emci=66746b99-9ea9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4217694b-b8a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230)

Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV |

clean_body: Help Us Keep Oregon State Forest Protections On Track! | | Hello Peter, The Oregon Board of Forestry is meeting tomorrow and we want to make sure they finalize the strongest Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) for Oregon’s Western State Forests. We know that the logging industry will show up to pressure them into weakening or even dumping the HCP altogether and we need to show up to protect it! A final decision won’t happen until near the end of the year, but every time there’s a Board of Forestry meeting we have to keep the pressure on in order to protect Oregon’s forests. Thanks to you and the power of your voice demanding the strongest Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) possible, this past July, the Department of Forestry (ODF) began implementing many of the protections in the State Forest HCP that we’ve been supporting for the past two years. It’s clear that ODF is anticipating and preparing for the final federal approval of the HCP in late 2024. Thank you for your support as we start the year,

GA Dems

Hello,
When the results started coming in on Election Night in 2022, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: **Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race!**

name: 2024 Survey Alert (via Courier HQ)
subject: A short read + survey
body:
Before the election cycle picks up, we wanted to hear from you!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76364188/447301081/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM2YzY1NDUtYmFhOS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SxVowpxH1STKd-DCbtSX1MocqG94ZyHo0p2K2ixFocU=&emci=1dc55c65-b4a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=736c6545-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
With the start of a new year, we wanted to take a step back and reach out to you to see what we’ve been doing well, what we should prioritize going forward — and more importantly, how we can improve as we head into one of the most consequential election years in recent memory.
With huge stakes ahead of us in this election, it’s important that we hear from you now to continue providing the communities we serve with the factual, detailed journalism that they’ve come to expect and that combats right-wing misinformation in its tracks.
As we head into 2024, we’re looking not only to continue the amazing work of our talented slate of journalists but to continue expanding into key battleground states to curb the inevitable wave of right-wing election disinformation.

body:
Will you take just a few minutes to respond to my team’s Election Year Priorities Survey? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76364346/447301678/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjVkYmQ2OC1iYWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyuYLy8FiUX8UEL2Y_V9gzIeA6uCskDUCTZYljVwnZY=&emci=7c5dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=825dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)

Happy New Year! We made incredible strides toward progress in 2023 — from introducing legislation to address the gun violence that devastates our communities, to working toward a clean energy future and fighting to protect access to abortion medication as conservatives try to take it off the market. This year, I know we can build on all we’ve accomplished by expanding our Senate Majority, taking back the House, and re-electing President Biden in November. In the meantime, it would mean a lot to me to hear what issues matter most to you in the year ahead. **[Will you take just a few minutes to respond to my team’s Election Year Priorities Survey? Your responses will help guide my team’s work in the year ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76364347/447301679/-1092500807?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjVkYmQ2OC1iYWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyuYLy8FiUX8UEL2Y_V9gzIeA6uCskDUCTZYljVwnZY=&emci=7c5dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=825dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76364350/447301680/-1092500807?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjVkYmQ2OC1iYWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyuYLy8FiUX8UEL2Y_V9gzIeA6uCskDUCTZYljVwnZY=&emci=7c5dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=825dbd68-baa9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)

body:

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAURb_mZEbkbDsYBh5wLwpSK9RJoaIzJz4mVh2I8mgVvr4ipZ2ex9pL2zZtDH4ypP8RUAfXE0ByQ8A4yKM9HPbdtIh7udjlR5zvS_wnYJha_rt8QFJubIj3qd4mzijYzFcJm0wLBYl1tkpq4zMNp8sVq1WJpfKaBXxu18ye14KRBAMBJTIBQGRKpnlVKl2xENKBc29JiTko9R3zUIfLB3fOhjil1bVJoqmHoe1nsYJQXF2ZXsYq8tj_fFXXhlA8lAnFJ6HIX8fn7bS7nXqSxVyC3N7e3sPm5emUdMa1XyHG0C81KXH-pXwHAAD__4ttX9s)

| [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A) Friend,

I hope you saw our recent video where an OMG journalist attended three undercover meetings with a staffer from Congressman Jim Costa's office here. He talked about the presence of other Chinese bio labs operating**IN THE UNITED STATES**.

When I started OMG, I was approached by big investors who were offering me millions to create my new media company.

They all had big visions I shared and would back them up with big dollars.

As I thought about my mission to advance investigative journalism and keep exposing the truth, I knew, with no doubts, that **I could not take their money**.

Bootstrapping a new venture isn't easy, and I'm not a wealthy man who could fund a new company out of pocket, so I turned to men and women just like you with no agenda other than to help me do what I do best . . . **investigate and report**.

My obligation to the 3,800 Americans who have supported OMG far outweighs any financial interest I would owe to an investor. OMG's supporters made this happen without asking a thing from me, and they have my gratitude.

**OMG is here for the long haul, and[our need for support will continue](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A). **

I need to expand OMG with three new hires and have the breathing room to meet payroll for a few months. To do that, **[I have to raise another $48,376](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A)** , and with the workload our small staff is carrying, my goal is to start flying in candidates next week.

**[Please donate today so I can hit this goal and focus on our ongoing investigations](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A)** if you haven't already.

I'm taking a short break right now to write you, but the lure of our next story draws me back to the editing room.

It's a massive story with implications that will rock Congress and most Americans. You will be shocked by what has been hidden from us by our nation's leaders. **It 's nefarious.**

The stories OMG has already released are prime examples of why I could never work with big-dollar investors. **We exposed Best Buy and the financial behemoth BlackRock. **

Just recently, I was on the phone with multiple sources inside investment powerhouses, **State Street Corporation and Vanguard who are sending me internal documents that they want me to publish! **

We also released a tragic story about the suicide of the daughter of a Saudi diplomat after being forced into an arranged marriage.

Could Fox News report that story? Likely not, Saudi billionaire Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud previously owned 17% of News Corp.

Any investor I could have partnered with would have discouraged me from exposing BlackRock, as their money would likely be part of the company's $109 billion holdings!

So, it comes down to me, you, and a small group of Americans who care about independent investigative journalism.

**America needs us, and OMG cannot exist without your support**. So please, **[donate today and help me reach the goal so OMG can hire three new staffers to keep going.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A)**

With most of our investigations, any other corporate newsroom would have their executives weighing the consequences of investors or advertisers and who they will upset in Congress. Their legal review of footage would take days if not weeks, and the public would continue to be put at risk or kept in the dark.

We can move quickly without having to weigh who we'll upset and we're confident in our accuracy in reporting . . . **because we were there, in person, to capture the footage and confront the subjects of our reports.**

**[And with your support](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A)** , you'll continue to see the results of OMG's work for years to come!

Stay tuned, and **[thank you so much for your support](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQBeCnGTqQPTY_KSjuXcRWKZN2ZewxWMEYGbMr3n5FFKXb9synMzPKr7OzRwv1f0CcnNkAEcQ_QNyTuKvb7RqPfL6K_LO843gO8QMQ07HSW75KCvLKzWdad5lpJSpudUYtr5lEgRfeZFMr5aURcjClUJUlxS6NbozkCrmoamvKzLXIUDLOEJFxKYpSD7LWxJgwSKVVINlzUWEjUZrc8qBolJuPQgefze2U0ro9D-sB-430HqlQC5mQTgHYhweRJU_GqTGGfQXsl5APbszd8k1bCnHL_ZAHD6Lfk__awh41gej-UFid6uzbPYjunWjlV-XGBUTnh1eWKJ7GJsMBK-XDviQQXcmy2Jr1x82z26oaJBufP-rgfwMAAP__cJWE6A).**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

clean_body: I hope you saw our recent video where an OMG journalist attended three undercover meetings with a staffer from Congressman Jim Costa's office here. He talked about the presence of other Chinese bio labs operating IN THE UNITED STATES. I hope you saw our recent video where an OMG journalist attended three undercover meetings with a staffer from Congressman Jim Costa's office here. He talked about the presence of other Chinese bio labs operating IN THE UNITED STATES. | Friend, I hope you saw our recent video where an OMG journalist attended three undercover meetings with a staffer from Congressman Jim Costa's office here. He talked about the presence of other Chinese bio labs operatingIN THE UNITED STATES. When I started OMG, I was approached by big investors who were offering me millions to create my new media company. They all had big visions I shared and would back them up with big dollars. As I thought about my mission to advance investigative journalism and keep exposing the truth, I knew, with no doubts, that I could not take their money. Bootstrapping a new venture isn't easy, and I'm not a wealthy man who could fund a new company out of pocket, so I turned to men and women just like you with no agenda other than to help me do what I do best . . . investigate and report. My obligation to the 3,800 Americans who have supported OMG far outweighs any financial interest I would owe to an investor. OMG's supporters made this happen without asking a thing from me, and they have my gratitude. OMG is here for the long haul, and. I need to expand OMG with three new hires and have the breathing room to meet payroll for a few months. To do that, , and with the workload our small staff is carrying, my goal is to start flying in candidates next week. if you haven't already. I'm taking a short break right now to write you, but the lure of our next story draws me back to the editing room. It's a massive story with implications that will rock Congress and most Americans. You will be shocked by what has been hidden from us by our nation's leaders. It 's nefarious. The stories OMG has already released are prime examples of why I could never work with big-dollar investors. We exposed Best Buy and the financial behemoth BlackRock. Just recently, I was on the phone with multiple sources inside investment powerhouses, State Street Corporation and Vanguard who are sending me internal documents that they want me to publish! We also released a tragic story about the suicide of the daughter of a Saudi diplomat after being forced into an arranged marriage. Could Fox News report that story? Likely not, Saudi billionaire Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud previously owned 17% of News Corp. Any investor I could have partnered with would have discouraged me from exposing BlackRock, as their money would likely be part of the company's $109 billion holdings! So, it comes down to me, you, and a small group of Americans who care about independent investigative journalism. America needs us, and OMG cannot exist without your support. So please, With most of our investigations, any other corporate newsroom would have their executives weighing the consequences of investors or advertisers and who they will upset in Congress. Their legal review of footage would take days if not weeks, and the public would continue to be put at risk or kept in the dark. We can move quickly without having to weigh who we'll upset and we're confident in our accuracy in reporting . . . because we were there, in person, to capture the footage and confront the subjects of our reports. , you'll continue to see the results of OMG's work for years to come! Stay tuned, and . In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fc68d3ac14ab4b0b859074a7850f72ea&_e=QZRhB6q0XQiX-tk3gMt8Z52_ZuX-2x3zNvzcS1S4HXo8NcHSoh2nWGIq6utosFGT0sjKz33XB1rXvbuOdOQi_MqUxR-9sadsAEMDjT0xylP_tJ1EjyWTS8PVziuK-6uwenaeZsQftlsvwIuqLWKetCqYR-tBKrsnWj7ELjSlrGKrL8ip20fTKnWNTb8dQKaxKjMog465cQQqmN2TauPP0wMVBFG8vblJ2GjK15-F24pKd4-VvWJQkc-xkiTthftMr-Eta1VIctcF7fybxaT-cCQclHjHWO0U0yDyNe4P59DzIIBITMXgh016aRAd3SGu3vNHaxQaJ-xEPmj4x3guRbVZ38Z8e7wIzRTyMsIN-do7qrju_5XbS8XQuGE_R4yvN9Ac8SGl-JVipayG0thvrw%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fc68d3ac14ab4b0b859074a7850f72ea&_e=QZRhB6q0XQiX-tk3gMt8Z52_ZuX-2x3zNvzcS1S4HXo8NcHSoh2nWGIq6utosFGT0sjKz33XB1rXvbuOdOQi_MqUxR-9sadsAEMDjT0xylP_tJ1EjyWTS8PVziuK-6uwenaeZsQftlsvwIuqLWKetCqYR-tBKrsnWj7ELjSlrGKrL8ip20fTKnWNTb8dQKaxKjMog465cQQqmN2TauPP0wMVBFG8vblJ2GjK15-F24pKd4-VvWJQkc-xkiTthftMpM4XkEoqbGU5zbK2a7pPHllvGovePKaL9BxXn4DCjOCqiBPP2oxiHn7wkr9IrMZ0Yk0LD9IKh5W64nZgyRmPughSmXM9U6PdkbkZSwx-CT8CwtS0jhU8il9pdQj40IZvZvU1mX5qgUyaKlqELQRaOA%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Kennedy Jr. -- **Thursday January 18th, 2024, Oahu Hawaii** **[Alabama Private Event](https://www.kennedy24.com/birmingham-alabama-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_year_upcoming_events_ralli&n=9)** to meet RFK Jr. and photo opportunity -- **Wednesday, January 24th, Birmingham. Kennedy Jr. -- **Saturday, February 10th, 2024, Detroit, MI**

---
## Q4 Fundraising Goal Exceeded
Thanks to you and the incredible outpouring of support, we exceeded our goal of **$6M to close out 2023 strong.** We'll be on the campaign trail throughout the country, at rallies and events starting tomorrow. With your help we can keep our momentum going and deliver RFK Jr.'s message of hope from coast to coast. Our next big initiative is ensuring ballot access in all 50 states and DC. Although it represents a massive effort, we're ready to take on the challenge, as we've proven with our recent victory in Utah. **The march toward Nov. 5, 2024 and the White House has begun.** **Happy New Year!**

## Whale Watching with RFK Jr. and Cheryl Hines in Hawaii
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has always been captivated by the mesmerizing allure of the ocean and its myriad creatures, which inspired him to devote his career as an attorney to environmental advocacy. **Experience an unforgettable morning of whale watching with him and Cheryl Hines off the pristine coast of Honolulu, Hawaii on January 18, 2024.** If you haven't entered the Hawaii Whale Watching Sweepstakes, there's still time! You could win**a trip for you and a guest to meet RFK Jr. to enjoy a morning of whale watching and conversation.** The prize winner will receive round-trip airfare from a major city, 2 nights hotel stay, and a morning of Hawaiian whale watching with RFK Jr. [**Enter now!** ](https://www.kennedy24.com/whale-sweepstakes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_year_upcoming_events_ralli&n=15 "whale watching")**Deadline for entry is January 9, 2024.** No donation necessary to win, [see the official rules](https://www.kennedy24.com/whale-watching-sweepstakes-rules?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_year_upcoming_events_ralli&n=16) for details.

subject: Thank you, Peter

body:
Onward to 2024.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240102-3345-footer&t=1&akid=3345%2E420207%2Ega5bfe)
Peter, on behalf of our team, we wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
Because of your support, we’ve moved mountains for Pramila’s work in Congress and our on-the-ground efforts to protect our progressive movement.
Together, we reached our end-of-the-year fundraising goal! That means we’ll have the tools, resources, and power to keep up this fight for working families and people everywhere in 2024.
Pramila is more determined than ever to hold MAGA Republicans accountable, stand up for what’s right, and deliver progress for ALL people, everywhere.
**We can’t wait to see what we can accomplish with you on our side in 2024. Thank you for your continued faith and support in our movement.**
Onward,
Team Pramila

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I wanted to begin 2024 with a thank you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1810%2E35263%2EzGvR5C)
Hi Peter, Happy New Year! I wanted to begin 2024 with a thank you. My team ran the numbers and let me know that we reached our grassroots fundraising goal before the December 31st public fundraising deadline. Your donations make all the difference for our team — helping us reach voters early on, run digital ads, hire more campaign staff, and so much more. Every dollar matters because we have our work cut out for us this November. Senate Republicans confirmed that megamillionaire Eric Hovde will run against me, and Wisconsin’s last Senate race was decided by just _1 point._ But with a strong grassroots team by my side, I know we’ll have what it takes to fight back against whatever my opponents and GOP groups throw our way, so we can keep Wisconsin blue. Thank you for being a part of this campaign. body:
| | |
Peter}, the newly simplified Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) form to request financial assistance for college is finally rolling out... _over three months later than it has been made available in the past._
However, there are some glitches with the “soft launch,” making the application only periodically available. Limited online access combined with the delayed release could delay financial aid award offers from colleges, throwing students’ education plans into limbo. ([Share my Tweet about it here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhrKD3t4VW4Msb_dfP9nQmjgitu1-QWALErhuwTtAoJcIgyS_AnrIcy1hAD99gEy9Fop5zVZQF-IkfH54XzM-fHw0dOhVs27jlnyJAUQxg-mmMgc1084t1_BP64Dkwntde6YKy_SQo9LYRoptX4BahoURKfNPrB3P2-eWOqPCmoj9UrDJ09L6qfaeZiddL9UNzouuZK4ZdQ1Xolp0QukyVWtODV5eW59l2zsjidKfW9r6ysPfJHbrst-OYfGMlBpPJcJksCk-WHK3XzWDV7sxS6W48iHjOwxpGLM76FE4ptGkxzz2AqK5v1DPmxB2I80j32FqtvSQ18-KsPBTAHTRKNQ/42n/vFviserdT-u9VRnFLyfzdg/h0/0ThrEuxCjrKQTCmlHvSlv98OymoLwQ1GkFEsC1GfiQs).)
**In the richest country in the world, where education should be free, students now have to race to complete an application on a system that is only periodically available!**

Students will have to rush to get their information submitted in time to qualify for crucial aid needed to attend college.
_College students should not be punished for the delayed roll out of the new FAFSA._
**The new FAFSA was supposed to make it easier to apply for aid, but its delayed release could jeopardize the financial assistance so many young people rely on!**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=f5344e6ae79f4c9d9ec4376c4553375d&_t=LCjsrcbsidcq8WmpBAnD9NMjEOk6IBbPT4t8vmxho7qGNHcAVHlZ6xMcVLmc0pgRqsIpr-xNzacNkObJDZwaqPEYl4hFUYhCU-l12TnAmKc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=f5344e6ae79f4c9d9ec4376c4553375d&_t=LCjsrcbsidcq8WmpBAnD9NMjEOk6IBbPT4t8vmxho7qGNHcAVHlZ6xMcVLmc0pgRqsIpr-xNzacNkObJDZwaqPEYl4hFUYhCU-l12TnAmKc%3D)

|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f5344e6ae79f4c9d9ec4376c4553375d&_e=TVdXGHh5CmDDidBdKaR1gidfMnkFkqlyIxKC1i8-oaOGQqS7Av-2L2YXFE8zl2HPc43novYqiyZClLdDCN9tvgqe75Q13THmyw7FHBpZM0YO52RP4XpVkRhOk39-6uoOVHWSdN_1UGrp5f0qJTSDy1hGhOckCns9IuzYYiucTzFxERZ18TkSFIb6_UEtcEXXLn491po5DbldiWBC-6S5dzkPo-DtuXpJBtH3DO7b75i6gwcwdYpkMLpNeDGLAMnjh0YTxJwUljFTGoqu5RauFdFqO1ES5Swx5hQYnULNCPCXSQMimx-Wtx5nW_B24F3gdlB7riu9_ZkNvAA64r6NXPEqN_eX2u67W_oAz-opVMg3oV-kNNLzAAjXVMcqAbNi)

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. clean_body: Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday. | | | Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday. We’re still looking for 624 folks in Pennsylvania to sign on to stand with Joe and Kamala, and we’re hoping to see your name on the list. This race is going to be close, and the only way we can win is with a massive grassroots team by our side. | | | Thanks for all that you do, Team Biden-Harris \--------------FORWARDED MESSAGE BELOW-------------- It’s go time, Peter. We’re officially in the election year, which means we’re closer than ever to finding out our eventual GOP opponent. Whether it’s Donald Trump or another MAGA Republican, we must show that President Biden and Vice President Harris have a movement of grassroots supporters backing them 100% of the way. | | Here's why your signature -- today -- is so important: Republicans are spending millions on attack ads in key states across the country. They’re promising to enact extremist policies that threaten to take away our fundamental freedoms and roll back our progress. The only way we can keep them out of the Oval Office is by putting in the hard work now \-- not months from now. Adding your name might seem like a small gesture, but by the time you read this, thousands of folks have already signed on. Now they’re counting on you to join them, Peter. | | Team Biden-Harris
