_And let me say: Happy New Year!_

My resolution for this year is clear. I plan to keep working hard for Kansas families in Congress and work across the aisle for the betterment of my constituents. I also plan to win against my extremist opponents in November’s elections.

It’s no secret: The NRCC, national Republicans like Elise Stefanik, and their special interest backers intend to target me just as heavily, if not heavier than they did in 2022.

**That’s why at the start of the election year, we’re putting everything together to make sure we’re ready.**

clean_body: | = Hi. Thank you for giving to my campaign’s last FEC deadline of 2023—grassroots supporters like you are what makes everything we do possible. And let me say: Happy New Year! My resolution for this year is clear. I plan to keep working hard for Kansas families in Congress and work across the aisle for the betterment of my constituents. I also plan to win against my extremist opponents in November’s elections. It’s no secret: The NRCC, national Republicans like Elise Stefanik, and their special interest backers intend to target me just as heavily, if not heavier than they did in 2022. That’s why at the start of the election year, we’re putting everything together to make sure we’re ready. If you weren’t able to give in December or want to contribute more to support our work in KS-03, click below to become a founding 2024 donor: | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = Thank you. Have a great New Year! — Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: When a culture move further from Jesus
body:
We're living in a pivotal time.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQltnURWabIkcm_3U3EevUi6bk30s9EsGtQHWmi742tIV4_ynTRsTRPUmiD7M51jzpUPRRhfo1WF_GDDPTN9Yc_SXec71fMcQx0Hm4_JwxqJrRo5R61wRDOt_Sg9CsDGlmwyub6zrO6qY7mqk7A8HXM1I%3D)
---
Friend, We're living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty-- which is God's idea, not man's idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQlgJHslNWJfjxf_WJnL-e2qX9lGPkyVfK3vcfiyzyfgdeLgCcSQxXpbEji9w4D7Oe5u4C5K-jAF33PK2pWVADkEPQmQzKX9o9C72925q6wWYxulHnt5RwPULxBgFtSvmxfr6-AD9rkBIfvsANkCS-Huw%3D)**
---
[Support Freedom Night in America ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQlvT7SwZ_0YlEmJJ69eq8dNu5cS6dKiPTlKbKSld17z5r6Y3-iXOBU-jwyHJsDTvPXJU9NEHYynByzO5O46HuERsKVzOu_2qMjk_LnR4WMMjM5dmkgV2yCLyaQDoDHw3f7fXdIINC0k_8t_K5nArHIsw%3D)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQlnlcDyNXM6QrJdcQQM1nPDPkvU3qQgY33pwQeaGXUn5KXY6cgy3WX6J_WYkhgB8E5iY3ftKD25ur8hN4qNV_LHmwMW-s4AOGqmF3fm7Hq2_6C38a6BtZsmGH2Oa6JTAYi4LmhwTfcEvX_8nNE4qOrPw%3D)

**_God 's Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of "wokeism" disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their "gender transition." Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith's mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQlsbxgsgQVZ283P-bTWVJ6diSKVoth5HEWVq03aP07tq5lZTROU1k-PqLNnEwo6HWrEgpjf87kQZWyljvl4omdFpf7_W1Q5JKbJ9HZS0Ye3wQ-Mrbaj4U5tNUTJpIu0ValSHB11t2Mc8xg2JCziZmqcQ%3D)**
---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQlpB3Hs8-mJUkTI3M3TqjQ5PTQNMiS-jgNUg2-cZuWoe4h3EmF7AzF_B9R5k-0HfzKfhZ_fM9GWS9lDaw6NP6d_sC5Zz-bq863Q2BDx9bUjWf1WjQi6MFK8-Oy7OLJmjeyxFkan-SN1h6kqTeGmXmnO8%3D)
---
Christians founded this country, Friend. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don't defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we're going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers' vision, it's our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0452c09c5ee24f619a775bd305f6d961&_e=i89a6vSgv69p0GZjBNvz1wi68IMcEEfubiiJOSUMYkcpRrcUnMjTltmOG4w37yi-5TjO_dfpUwHHjz1zFM3P31AGNmYOz6xPUssEgmmdzAQWEpRtB9PsSGc6pEkxAf_clEBGPfTNmzOemCIazxtQltf8HNT_ueJobgW6PxR0jDdP7iAhKGiKDBIsKwyouIOfuDuwmGNU0o0NPRG-dr6pMOfEhBrG4TTjZ0kDHpHRucH1FWSZKNSkSACu6GF4z803GSZTrEzqCawKtQ2xM49pzJfqdQTnHNc-4Srgt2iRVfQ%3D)** Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie Kirk Turning Point USA Faith

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa) Friend,

I hope you saw our recent video where an OMG journalist attended three undercover meetings with a staffer from Congressman Jim Costa's office here. He talked about the presence of other Chinese bio labs operating**IN THE UNITED STATES**.

When I started OMG, I was approached by big investors who were offering me millions to create my new media company.

They all had big visions I shared and would back them up with big dollars.

As I thought about my mission to advance investigative journalism and keep exposing the truth, I knew, with no doubts, that **I could not take their money**.

Bootstrapping a new venture isn't easy, and I'm not a wealthy man who could fund a new company out of pocket, so I turned to men and women just like you with no agenda other than to help me do what I do best . . . **investigate and report**.

My obligation to the 3,800 Americans who have supported OMG far outweighs any financial interest I would owe to an investor. OMG's supporters made this happen without asking a thing from me, and they have my gratitude.

**OMG is here for the long haul, and[our need for support will continue](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa). **

I need to expand OMG with three new hires and have the breathing room to meet payroll for a few months. To do that, **[I have to raise another $48,376](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa)** , and with the workload our small staff is carrying, my goal is to start flying in candidates next week.

**[Please donate today so I can hit this goal and focus on our ongoing investigations](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa)** if you haven't already.

I'm taking a short break right now to write you, but the lure of our next story draws me back to the editing room.

It's a massive story with implications that will rock Congress and most Americans. You will be shocked by what has been hidden from us by our nation's leaders. **It 's nefarious.**

The stories OMG has already released are prime examples of why I could never work with big-dollar investors. **We exposed Best Buy and the financial behemoth BlackRock. **

Just recently, I was on the phone with multiple sources inside investment powerhouses, **State Street Corporation and Vanguard who are sending me internal documents that they want me to publish! **

We also released a tragic story about the suicide of the daughter of a Saudi diplomat after being forced into an arranged marriage.

Could Fox News report that story? Likely not, Saudi billionaire Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud previously owned 17% of News Corp.

Any investor I could have partnered with would have discouraged me from exposing BlackRock, as their money would likely be part of the company's $109 billion holdings!

So, it comes down to me, you, and a small group of Americans who care about independent investigative journalism.

**America needs us, and OMG cannot exist without your support**. So please, **[donate today and help me reach the goal so OMG can hire three new staffers to keep going.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa)**

With most of our investigations, any other corporate newsroom would have their executives weighing the consequences of investors or advertisers and who they will upset in Congress. Their legal review of footage would take days if not weeks, and the public would continue to be put at risk or kept in the dark.

We can move quickly without having to weigh who we'll upset and we're confident in our accuracy in reporting . . . **because we were there, in person, to capture the footage and confront the subjects of our reports.**

**[And with your support](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa)** , you'll continue to see the results of OMG's work for years to come!

Stay tuned, and **[thank you so much for your support](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0z7GOnDAQBuCnGTqQGRvMFhRJECkiJXXSRMYMrBMGs7Y5tPf0J1ar7a7959M_M4a3xU33FvRXQLy6MQIiyC-AePt9cNj_8Y_v-Z_3X_mt_snVOcRvgJjuG73ks6QgNm45U91lYyunUaiM2lILhbKuZJ1dW2WEGiY7lhpRXxoUiNhQaQlRi8pMmWtRoBKlQJQCy7LQ0pK61GayttGqaUCJx57CMAVnTRnTYULwngvrOVvaa0pbfBzWA_aR7B6oMCuNPp0CsPf_iSZiGp2Zg983wH71-eDm3K1vFJMPMech9wyy3xP_jX4PlkB2nyisT3X27QyyeyXW8GbcvILseHhmicJpjoCAtWG_rwlkV4kstON2uGVxsdagxPz40Xr-CAAA__88E4Sa).**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: www.officialderrickgates.com
subject: Derrick Gates 66th Assembly Central Committee
body:
Dear Supporters, For those who have been alongside me in my political journey here in California, you've witnessed how God has used us to champion th
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=114705.121.1.97fc2477387ce6a17dbcc16ea292cc96)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=114705.122.1.6eb0ec31c8a7f69f30550ba8a686079a) |
---
|
---
Dear Supporters,
For those who have been alongside me in my political journey here in California, you've witnessed how God has used us to champion the cause of our freedoms. Now, as I navigate this crucial juncture, I'm strategically positioning myself to serve in the most impactful way—that position is on the Central Committee.
This role places me as a gatekeeper, influencing decisions that shape not only our state but our nation. As this is an elected position, I must invest in this campaign to make a difference. I'm seeking to raise $1,500 promptly to fund mailers that will reach our district.
Your support is vital in our collective effort to push back against the forces of darkness. Together, let's make a lasting impact on the future. Your contribution will play a crucial role in this endeavor.
Thank you for standing with me.
To sow into this please pick one of the below
Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4
Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates)
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=114705.123.1.c111ad52a3154cb877fb317b57163bfe)

I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude.
Throughout 2023, we worked hard to invest in Colorado, stand up for working families, and defend fundamental rights nationwide.
Your grassroots support is a critical piece of this work.
My campaign had a big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of December. With your support, we surpassed our goal.
Because of our success last quarter, we’re going into 2024 strong — ready to elect Democrats in key battleground districts across Colorado and the country in November.
Thank you again, friend. You are instrumental in this fight.
Best,
Michael

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Go Blue, Vote Red!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Winning the Rose Bowl–and the Senate| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=83587deb5c1749f99f58dba23dbba94b&_e=5YEzLOU4qLM-m-w787v85BorJgQ9UkS191EjVocL08xsGYx2EvXixgD2XXjJorlQaOGoElTI_-QFBIsDvDiMNtNfzzuueMcc55TLFEBpY4tKJ57j6W_9jORR3C44R7BCDkdpSGKGffEaJM_y5Rwq34Ah9qGLj9aEuljv7bDuw1p6Qo_9dzMG52gWvXOdCapfiORfe9pXTK7OwxZGr93rwYi13OR6dQhfJQCmEdGy5KGwd8mhanOMaQnMUdoIqgHWOwo1hDP-7ulV9nHtotJ7Ntmzf-4rBm_AMvGbDk-ucsmE7h2LDY1rWXoMwsHNy3y6NVWu9lOaCYTsU0Qm3FwWbZth0nNLcB1QMvDyoGIio0LWCIrbFcQazYcWVr8DCz5UxIc83_cWqIacEZO-6ZJQFw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Is there any better way to ring in the New Year than to watch your team win the Rose Bowl? I was super proud to watch our Wolverines take home a big win last night, and I’ll always be proud to say **[GO BLUE!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=83587deb5c1749f99f58dba23dbba94b&_e=5YEzLOU4qLM-m-w787v85BorJgQ9UkS191EjVocL08xsGYx2EvXixgD2XXjJorlQaOGoElTI_-QFBIsDvDiMNtNfzzuueMcc55TLFEBpY4tKJ57j6W_9jORR3C44R7BCDkdpSGKGffEaJM_y5Rwq34Ah9qGLj9aEuljv7bDuw1p6Qo_9dzMG52gWvXOdCapfiORfe9pXTK7OwxZGr93rwYi13OR6dQhfJQCmEdGy5KGwd8mhanOMaQnMUdoIqgHWc2IGyQFBNt4TArgU08ieCGbzxxjQ-lmLZWWHat5CEzduC--3xqEPXHaThqmhwO_lMS4_469BjXDP879D5RoSBjfqa26zh4WV8qjCF2Zl9YnWWNBlboLFtgouzxRPkbxAge5VsWsf5d7NL8nm942ecg%3D%3D)** **But Going Blue is for football, not for politics.** Ever since the Senate went blue, our country has been given an open border, a failing economy, and a rogue, unrestrained bureaucracy. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Putin’s idea of a “Happy New Year”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
While most of us enjoy the first few days of this new year, Putin has taken advantage of inaction and dissent from the GOP to make his next move against Ukraine.
#
Derek,
From all of us at VoteVets, wishing you a happy new year.
While most of us enjoy the first few days of this new year, Putin has taken advantage of inaction and dissent from the GOP to make his next move against Ukraine.
Over the last two days our friends in Kyiv and other population centers in Ukraine have been under some of the most intense attacks since the start of the war. Russia is going out of its way to hit civilian targets, pushing Ukrainian air defenses to the brink.
They need help — they need the United States.
But Republicans in the House and Senate continue to drag their feet. They do Putin’s work for him.
This must stop.
**[We need you to add your voice and DEMAND that the GOP come to the table and pass critical aid for Ukraine. They ask only for the tools they need to defend their families and liberate their country. They need our help.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240102_vv_em_ukraine/?source=em240102-1-30?refcode2=22763.3013755.1PEPNJ&akid=22763%2E3013755%2E1PEPNJ)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240102_vv_em_ukraine/?source=em240102-1-30?refcode2=22763.3013755.1PEPNJ&akid=22763%2E3013755%2E1PEPNJ)
---
Thank you. This is so important.
The team at VoteVets

subject: I’m suing Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Appeal courts rule that Trump is not immune from Jan 6 lawsuits — including the one I’ve brought against him.

| Peter,

Donald Trump is facing a **tapestry of accountability** from criminal and civil lawsuits all across the country.**This includes the lawsuit I brought against him, which an appeals court just doubled down on.** | [HOLD TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76365963/447307557/128451407?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20240102_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFiODBmMC1jOGE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flOaOS_B1DM0-GFI3GoeVX6U9xj70GkQqUYg-vV-YtQ=)
---
Look, we’re just days away from the anniversary of Jan 6 and these charges against the failed former president are STILL looming large.

Remember, it's because of Trump that his anti-democratic, white-supremacist mob of supporters violently charged the Capitol grounds with the clear intention of _**interfering with our democratic process.**_

Now, appeals courts are making it clear: Lawsuits against the former president over the Jan 6 riot can move forward. **Peter, that’s because no one is above the law.**

**He’s still running for president in 2024, and our country isn’t safe from his chaos until he’s held accountable once and for all. That’s why I’m helping lead the charge to hold Trump accountable for his attempts to smear our democracy and its institutions.**

[**Can you split a donation between me and Mark Takano so we can continue fighting for justice and accountability in the name of Donald Trump?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76365964/447307558/128451407?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20240102_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFiODBmMC1jOGE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flOaOS_B1DM0-GFI3GoeVX6U9xj70GkQqUYg-vV-YtQ=)

clean_body: Appeal courts rule that Trump is not immune from Jan 6 lawsuits — including the one I’ve brought against him. | Peter, Donald Trump is facing a tapestry of accountability from criminal and civil lawsuits all across the country.This includes the lawsuit I brought against him, which an appeals court just doubled down on. | = Look, we’re just days away from the anniversary of Jan 6 and these charges against the failed former president are STILL looming large. Remember, it's because of Trump that his anti-democratic, white-supremacist mob of supporters violently charged the Capitol grounds with the clear intention of interfering with our democratic process. Now, appeals courts are making it clear: Lawsuits against the former president over the Jan 6 riot can move forward. Peter, that’s because no one is above the law. He’s still running for president in 2024, and our country isn’t safe from his chaos until he’s held accountable once and for all. That’s why I’m helping lead the charge to hold Trump accountable for his attempts to smear our democracy and its institutions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and Mark Takano will go through immediately: = = = = = — Eric Swalwell | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

subject: REPORT: Thank you from the Cox Home and Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Here is my initial report. We are in this to win. Thank you. | | | |
---
| | |
## Thank you \- you are helping us make history!

Now let's protect our children and country in 2024.
Friend, While we are still awaiting our world-class treasurer's data from crunching the numbers from last-minute donors, thanks to you it's clear:
* >> we ended 2023 with our first FEC quarter to report _**the strongest position ever**_ for our campaign launch, meeting our first target goal.
* >> Even with less than 60 days from the launch of our campaign to raise funds, I'm informed we out-raised our launch for governor - and that was a state-wide race. Thank you! Like Valerie and I believed, you also haven't given up on our country.

We had such a great response to our book give-a-way fundraiser for the Kash Patel "Government Gangsters" book, we decided to draw TWO winners. They are (see the pics below - drawn by my son from my cowboy hat!):
Kevin Z.
Angela M.

Thank you to everyone!!!

Now, we have our work cut out for us. The far left is looking to buy this seat with a truly fringe, extremist candidate who will do everything to undermine our money, our jobs, our personal liberty and constitutional order. Consider what the Biden Left is doing and what your Congressman needs to be ready to oppose on Day One:
* They will _send our children to die_ in foreign wars.
* They are _collapsing our Border_ and allowing trafficking of thousands of children.
* They will _close down our electric plants_ while driving electric cars.
* They want to _crash our dollar_ with extreme spending and a $33 trillion debt, while forcing us into a CCP-style digital currency.
* They want to _indoctrinate your children_ rather than educate them; and they vote to allow mutilation of a minor's sexual organs. _Anyone who purposefully mutilates a child should be in jail for life for extreme child abuse and violation of human rights_.
* And they have _left our veterans behind_ while paying for illegal aliens here in Maryland on our tax dollars.

But these extremist policies of the Left will not and cannot stand. No civilization has long endured such madness. I will fight them publicly with you by my side. And by the grace of Almighty God and His Son the Lord Jesus Christ, in 2024 we can change that narrative and bring stability, freedom and honor back to America.

In 2024, we believe in a nation that adheres to the constitution and rule of law for all people. We believe in a nation that once again preserves election integrity and elects President Trump as our 47th president. And I believe this is the year to elect me as your voice in Congress. Will you stand with me in 2024? For those who missed our first FEC report deadline but want to be part of this work to win for all of us, your [contribution now](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=a79bebeb7a&e=5bb5efcda7) continues our momentum to victory.

Thank you and God bless.

Freedom and victory,

---
